moves.name: Absorb
moves.effect_text: After the target takes damage, the user gains HP equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

moves.name: Acid
moves.effect_text: Acid lowers the target’s Special Defense by -1 Combat Stage on 18+.

moves.name: Acid Armor
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: The user becomes Liquefied. While Liquefied, the user is Slowed and cannot take Standard Actions except to Resolve the effect of Acid Armor, the user's Movement is never obstructed by rough or slow terrain, and the user can shift even through the smallest openings. Furthermore, while Liquefied, the user is completely immune to all Physical damage and becomes completely invisible if fully submerged in any liquid. Resolution Effect: The user gains +1 Defense CS, then stops being liquified.

moves.name: Acid Spray
moves.effect_text: Acid Spray lowers the target’s Special Defense by -2 CS.

moves.name: Acrobatics
moves.effect_text: If the user is not holding an item, Acrobatics instead has a Damage Base of 11 (3d10+10/27)

moves.name: Acupressure
moves.effect_text: Roll 1d6. On a result of 1, raise the target’s Attack by +2 CS. On a result of 2, raise the target’s Defense by +2 CS. On a result of 3, raise the target’s Special Attack by +2 CS. On a result of 4, raise the target’s Special Defense by +2 CS. On a result of 5, raise the target’s Speed by +2 CS. On a result of 6, raise the target’s Accuracy by +2.

moves.name: Aerial Ace
moves.effect_text: Aerial Ace cannot miss.

moves.name: Aeroblast
moves.effect_text: Aeroblast is a Critical Hit on an Even-Numbered Roll.

moves.name: After You
moves.effect_text: After You is a Swift Action. The target takes their turn for the round immediately after the user finishes their turn, ignoring Initiative. After You may only affect a target that has not yet acted that round and can only affect willing targets.

moves.name: Agility
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Speed 2 Combat Stages.

moves.name: Air Cutter
moves.effect_text: Air Cutter is a Critical Hit on 18+.

moves.name: Air Slash
moves.effect_text: Air Slash Flinches the target on 15+.

moves.name: Ally Switch
moves.effect_text: Ally Switch may be declared during a foe’s turn as an Interrupt. The user chooses one willing ally within 6 meters; the target and the user switch places. If the ally was a target of a Move, the user is now the target; If the user was a target of a Move, the ally is now the target.

moves.name: Amnesia
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Special Defense 2 Combat Stages.

moves.name: Anchor Shot
moves.effect_text: The Target is Trapped for 2 rounds. Anchor Shot may only be used from the user's Anchor Token.

moves.name: Ancient Power
moves.effect_text: The user has each of its stats raised by +1 CS on 19+.

moves.name: Apple Acid
moves.effect_text: The target’s Special Defense is lowered by 1 CS.

moves.name: Aqua Ring
moves.effect_text: Aqua Ring covers the user in a Coat that heals the user at the beginning of their turn. The user is healed a Tick of Hit Points each turn.

moves.name: Arcane Fury
moves.effect_text: Arcane Fury’s Targets become Vulnerable on 19+.

moves.name: Arcane Storm
moves.effect_text: All targets of Arcane Storm are Slowed and Vulnerable for 1 Full Round. Limitation: Ranged Weapons only

moves.name: Aromatherapy
moves.effect_text: All allies in the burst are cured of one status condition of their choice.

moves.name: Aromatic Mist
moves.effect_text: Raise the Special Defense of all allied legal targets by +1 CS.

moves.name: Assist
moves.effect_text: Randomly select another Pokémon on the user’s roster and then randomly select a Move that Pokémon knows. Assist’s user uses that Move immediately.

moves.name: Assurance
moves.effect_text: If Assurance’s target has already been damaged by a Move on the same round Assurance is being used, Assurance has a Damage Base of 12 (3d12+10 / 30) instead. This effect may trigger only once per Scene per Target.

moves.name: Astonish
moves.effect_text: Astonish Flinches the target on 15+. Once per Scene, if the target is unaware of the user's presence, Astonish automatically Flinches.

moves.name: Astral Barrage
moves.effect_text: Legal targets hit by Astral Barrage are Slowed for one full round.

moves.name: Attack of Opportunity
moves.effect_text: You may make a Struggle Attack against the triggering foe as an Interrupt. You may use Attack of Opportunity only once per round. Attacks of Opportunity cannot be made by Sleeping, Flinched, or Paralyzed targets. Attacks of Opportunity can be triggered in multiple ways: »» An adjacent foe uses a Push, Grapple, Disarm, Trip, or Dirty Trick Maneuver that does not target you. »» An adjacent foe stands up. »» An adjacent foe uses a Ranged Attack that does not target someone adjacent to it. »» An adjacent foe uses a Standard Action to pick up or retrieve an item. »» An adjacent foe Shifts out of a Square adjacent to you.

moves.name: Attack Order
moves.effect_text: Attack Order is a Critical Hit on 18+.

moves.name: Attract
moves.effect_text: Attract Infatuates the target if its gender is the opposite of the user’s. Attract fails when used by or against Genderless targets.

moves.name: Aura Sphere
moves.effect_text: Aura Sphere cannot miss.

moves.name: Aura Wheel
moves.effect_text: The user’s Speed is increased 1 CS. Special: If the user is in Hangry Mode, Aura Wheel is Dark-Typed.

moves.name: Aurora Beam
moves.effect_text: Aurora Beam lowers the target's Attack 1 Combat Stage on 18+. *Grants: Freezer

moves.name: Aurora Veil
moves.effect_text: Blessing – Any user affected by Aurora Veil may activate it when receiving Damage to resist the Damage one step. Aurora Veil may be activated 2 times, and then disappears. Special: Auora Veil can only be used when the user is in Hailing Weather. The Blessings persist even after Hailing Weather has ended, however.

moves.name: Autotomize
moves.effect_text: For the remainder of the Encounter, the user’s Weight Class is one value lower, to a minimum of 1. If the user can, the user’s Speed is raised by +2 Combat Stages.

moves.name: Avalanche
moves.effect_text: When declaring Avalanche, the user does nothing and may not Shift. At the end of the round, the user may Shift and use Avalanche. If the target damaged the user this round, Avalanche has a Damage Base of 12 (4d10+15 / 40).

moves.name: Baby-Doll Eyes
moves.effect_text: Lower the target's Attack by -1 CS.

moves.name: Backswing
moves.effect_text: Limitation: Large Melee Weapons Only

moves.name: Bane
moves.effect_text: The target loses a Tick of Hit Points at the start of their next three turns and suffers a -2 penalty to all Save Checks on those turns.

moves.name: Baneful Bunker
moves.effect_text: If the user is hit by an attack, the user may use Baneful Bunker. The user is instead not hit by the Move. You do not take any damage nor are you affected by any of the Move’s effects. In addition, if the triggering attack was Melee ranged, the attacker is Poisoned.

moves.name: Barb Barrage
moves.effect_text: The target is Poisoned on a 17+. Once a Scene, if Barb Barrage’s target has a Status Condition, you may choose to not roll for Five Strike. Instead, treat Barb Barrage as though it automatically rolled an 8 for Five Strike.

moves.name: Barrier
moves.effect_text: The user creates a Barrier of psychic energy. The user places up to 4 segments of Barrier; each segment must be continuous with another segment, and at least one must be adjacent to the user. These barriers count as blocking terrain and last until the end of the encounter or until they are destroyed. Each Barrier segment is 2 meters tall, 1 meter wide, and 2 centimeters thick. Each segment has 20 Hit Points, 15 Damage Reduction, and takes damage as if it was Psychic Typed.

moves.name: Bash!
moves.effect_text: Bash! lowers the target’s Initiative to 0 for 1 full round on 15+.

moves.name: Baton Pass
moves.effect_text: The user is replaced with another Pokémon from their trainer’s roster. All Combat Stage, Coats, and [Stratagems] on Baton Pass’ user are transferred to the replacement. Baton Pass may be used to switch even if the user is Trapped.

moves.name: Beak Blast
moves.effect_text: Beak Blast must be declared at the start of the round. If the user is hit by a Melee attack this round, the triggering attacker is Burned. At the end of the round, the user Shifts and attacks with Beak Blast.

moves.name: Beat Up
moves.effect_text: The user and up to two allies adjacent to the target may each make a Struggle Attack against the target. These Struggle Attacks hit for Dark-Type Damage instead of their usual Type. Beat Up may trigger Pack Hunt only once, no matter the number of attacks.

moves.name: Behemoth Bash
moves.effect_text: The DB of Behemoth Bash increases by +2 for each positive CS the target has, to a maximum of DB 20.

moves.name: Behemoth Blade
moves.effect_text: The DB of Behemoth Blade increases by +2 for each positive CS the target has, to a maximum of DB 20.

moves.name: Belch
moves.effect_text: Belch cannot be used if the user has not traded in a Digestion/Food Buff during this Scene.

moves.name: Belly Drum
moves.effect_text: The user gains +6 Attack CS and loses HP equal to 1/2 of their Max HP.

moves.name: Bestow
moves.effect_text: The user gives its held item to the target, unless the target is already holding an item. Using Bestow is a Swift Action.

moves.name: Bide
moves.effect_text: The user may use Bide as a Reaction Move upon being Hit by a Damaging Move. During their next available turn, the user may Shift and then use Bide, causing all Adjacent foes to lose X HP, where X is the amount of Damage taken since declaring use of Bide (Loss of life through effects such as Poison is not ‘Damage’).

moves.name: Bind
moves.effect_text: The user gains a +1 Bonus to Accuracy Rolls made to initiate Grapple Maneuvers, and +2 to Skill Checks made to initiate Grapple Maneuvers or gain Dominance. Whenever the user gains Dominance in a Grapple, the target of the Grapple loses a Tick of Hit Points.

moves.name: Bite
moves.effect_text: Bite Flinches the target on 15+.

moves.name: Bitter Malice
moves.effect_text: : Legal targets hit by Bitter Malice are Stuck and Trapped until the end of their next turn on a 19+. Once a Scene, if Bitter Malice’s target has a Status Condition, you may have Bitter Malice’s Damage Base be 12 instead (3d12+10 / 30).

moves.name: Blaze Kick
moves.effect_text: Blaze Kick Burns the target on 19+ and is a Critical Hit on 18+.

moves.name: Bleakwind Storm
moves.effect_text: The target is Flinched on a 15+ and Frozen on a 19+.

moves.name: Bleed!
moves.effect_text: The target loses a Tick of Hit Points at the start of their next three turns.

moves.name: Blind
moves.effect_text: You and the target make Opposed Stealth Checks. If you win, the target is Blinded for one full round.

moves.name: Blizzard
moves.effect_text: Blizzard Freezes all legal target on 15+. If the target is in Hailing Weather, Blizzard cannot miss.

moves.name: Block
moves.effect_text: The target is Stuck and Trapped until the beginning of your next turn.

moves.name: Blue Flare
moves.effect_text: Blue Flare Burns the target on 17+.

moves.name: Body Press
moves.effect_text: The user’s Defense Stat is added to the damage roll instead of the Attack Stat.

moves.name: Body Slam
moves.effect_text: Body Slam Paralyzes the target on 15+.

moves.name: Bolt Beak
moves.effect_text: Against targets with a lower initiative that have not yet acted this round, Bolt Beak deals +10 damage.

moves.name: Bolt Strike
moves.effect_text: Bolt Strike Paralyzes the target on 17+.

moves.name: Bon Mot
moves.effect_text: Make a Guile Check, opposed by the target’s Guile or Focus. If you win, the target is Enraged and cannot spend AP for one full round. The target does not gain a Save Check against this effect.

moves.name: Bone Club
moves.effect_text: Bone Club Flinches the target on 18+.

moves.name: Bounce
moves.effect_text: The user first Shifts, gaining a +1 Bonus to Movement Speed and to their Jump Capabilities. After the user Shifts, they may attack with Bounce. The target becomes Vulnerable, and is Paralyzed on 16+. Grants High Jump +1

moves.name: Brave Bird
moves.effect_text: The target is pushed back 2 meters.

moves.name: Breaking Swipe
moves.effect_text: The target’s Attack is lowered 1 CS.

moves.name: Brick Break
moves.effect_text: Light Screen and Reflect may not be activated in response to Brick Break.

moves.name: Brine
moves.effect_text: If the target’s Hit Points are under 50%, Brine’s Damage Base is increased to Damage Base 13 (4d10+10 / 35).

moves.name: Bubble
moves.effect_text: Bubble lowers the target's Speed by -1 CS on 16+..

moves.name: Bubblebeam
moves.effect_text: Bubblebeam lowers the target's Speed by -1 CS on 18+.

moves.name: Bug Bite
moves.effect_text: If the target has a stored Digestion/Food Buff or has traded in a Digestion/Food Buff this Scene, the user may gain the effects of the Digestion/Food Buff. This does no count towards the Usual limit on the user's Digestion/Food Buffs.

moves.name: Bug Buzz
moves.effect_text: Bug Buzz lowers the Special Defense of all legal targets by -1 CS on 19+.

moves.name: Bulk Up
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Attack and Defense by +1 CS each.

moves.name: Bulldoze
moves.effect_text: All Legal Targets are lowered 1 Speed Combat Stage.

moves.name: Bullseye
moves.effect_text: Bullseye is a Critical Hit on 16+. Limitation: Ranged Weapons Only

moves.name: Burn Up
moves.effect_text: Until the end of the encounter, the user loses its Fire-Type (pure Fire-Types become Normal-Type).

moves.name: Burning Jealousy
moves.effect_text: After Burning Jealousy has resolved, the user may choose to Burn foes within 5m that have had any CS raised since the beginning of that foe’s last turn. This Effect may trigger only once per Scene.

moves.name: Calm Mind
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Special Attack 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Camouflage
moves.effect_text: The user changes their Type to match the field. Pick one type from the following table. If two or more rows are relevant (such as because of Weather), pick one: -Beach: Ground or Water -Cave: Rock or Dark -Desert: Ground or Rock -Forest: Grass -Fresh Water / Ocean: Water -Grassland: Normal or Grass -Marsh: Water or Poison -Mountain: Rock or Ground -Rainforest: Grass or Poison -Taiga: Ice or Grass -Tundra: Ice -Urban: Normal or Steel -Sunny: Fire -Rainy: Water -Hailing: Ice -Sandstorming: Rock Your GM may provide additional options should they choose (for instance, an Ethereal Forest may provide Psychic and Fairy options.) *Grants Blender

moves.name: Captivate
moves.effect_text: Captivate lowers the target's Special Attack by -2 CS. Captivate may not affect something that is the same gender as the user or something that is genderless.

moves.name: Ceaseless Edge
moves.effect_text: The target is put in a Vortex. Ceaseless Edge is a Critical Hit on a 19+.

moves.name: Charge
moves.effect_text: If the user performs an Electric Attack on its next turn, add its Damage Dice Roll an extra time to the damage. Raise the user's Special Defense by +1 CS.

moves.name: Charge Beam
moves.effect_text: If Charge Beam successfully hits a target, roll 1d20. On a roll of 7+, the user's Special Attack is raised by +1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Charm
moves.effect_text: Lower the target’s Attack by -2 CS.

moves.name: Chatter
moves.effect_text: Chatter confuses all targets on 16+.

moves.name: Cheap Shot
moves.effect_text: Cheap Shot cannot miss. Limitation: Small Melee and Short Ranged Weapons Only

moves.name: Chip Away
moves.effect_text: Ignore any Armor, Damage Reduction, or changes in the target's Defense or Special Defense (such as from Combat Stages) when calculating damage.

moves.name: Chloroblast
moves.effect_text: The user’s Hit Points are reduced by 50% of their full Hit Point value. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented or reduced in any way.

moves.name: Circle Throw
moves.effect_text: The target is Pushed 6 meters minus their Weight Class. The target is also Tripped on 15+.

moves.name: Clamp
moves.effect_text: The user gains a +1 Bonus to Accuracy Rolls made to initiate Grapple Maneuvers, and +2 to Skill Checks made to initiate Grapple Maneuvers or gain Dominance. Whenever the user gains Dominance in a Grapple, the target of the Grapple loses a Tick of Hit Points.

moves.name: Clanging Scales
moves.effect_text: The user adds half their Defense Stat to Clanging Scale's Damage Roll. After the Move is resolved, the user's Defense is lowered by 1 CS.

moves.name: Clangorous Soul
moves.effect_text: The user loses 1/3rd of their Max Hit Points and has each of its stats raised by +1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Clear Smog
moves.effect_text: The target's Combat Stages are reset to their defaults, and all Coats on the target are destroyed. Clear Smog cannot miss.

moves.name: Close Combat
moves.effect_text: Lower the user’s Defense and Special Defense by -1 CS each after damage.

moves.name: Coaching
moves.effect_text: The user and any allies in the Burst have their Attack and Defense raised by 1 CS.

moves.name: Coil
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Attack and Defense by +1 CS, and the user gains +1 Accuracy.

moves.name: Cone of Force
moves.effect_text: Cone of Force Pushes all targets 2 meters, and lowers their Evasion by -2 for 1 full round.. Limitation: Melee Weapons Only

moves.name: Confide
moves.effect_text: Lower the target's Special Attack by -1 CS.

moves.name: Confuse Ray
moves.effect_text: The target is Confused.

moves.name: Confusion
moves.effect_text: Confusion Confuses the target on 19+.

moves.name: Constrict
moves.effect_text: Lower the target’s Speed by -1 CS. Constrict may be used as a Swift Action against targets the user is Grappling and automatically hits when performed this way.

moves.name: Conversion
moves.effect_text: The user becomes the elemental Type of their choice as long as they have a Move that is the same elemental Type until the end of the encounter. Replace all other Types.

moves.name: Conversion2
moves.effect_text: The user becomes the elemental Type of their choice as long as the Type resists the elemental Type of the Move it last took damage from until the end of the encounter. Replace all other Types.

moves.name: Copycat
moves.effect_text: Use the Move the target has used on their last turn. You may choose new targets for the Move. Copycat cannot miss.

moves.name: Core Enforcer
moves.effect_text: Each Target has its Ability disabled until the end of the encounter. If a target has more than one Ability, you choose one of them to disable.

moves.name: Corrosive Gas
moves.effect_text: Targets hit have their current Held Item(s) unable to be used for the remainder of the Scene. In addition, Steel-Type targets hit lose their immunity to Poison until they Faint or Take A Breather; Poison instead counts as neutral against Steel.

moves.name: Cosmic Power
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Cotton Guard
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Defense 3 Combat Stages.

moves.name: Cotton Spore
moves.effect_text: All legal targets have their Speed lowered 2 Combat Stages.

moves.name: Counter
moves.effect_text: Counter may be used as a Reaction when the user is hit by a damaging Physical Attack. Resolve the Triggering Attack, with Counter's user resisting the attack one step further. After the attack is resolved, if Counter's user was not Fainted, the triggering foe then loses Hit Points equal to twice the amount of Hit Points lost by the user from the triggering attack. Note that Counter is Physical, and while it cannot miss, it cannot hit targets immune to Fighting-Type Moves.

moves.name: Court Change
moves.effect_text: All Blessings and Hazards swap which side that they belong to.

moves.name: Covet
moves.effect_text: Covet takes the target’s Held Item or Accessory Slot Item and attaches it to Covet’s user, if the user is not holding anything.

moves.name: Crabhammer
moves.effect_text: Crabhammer is a Critical Hit on 18+.

moves.name: Crafty Shield
moves.effect_text: If the user or an Ally within 2 meters of Crafty Shield's user is hit by a Status Move, you may use Crafty Shield as an Interrupt. All targets in Crafty Shield's area-of-effect including the user, are instead not hit by the triggering Move and do not suffer any of its effects.

moves.name: Cross Chop
moves.effect_text: Cross Chop is a Critical Hit on 16+.

moves.name: Cross Poison
moves.effect_text: Cross Poison is a Critical Hit on 18+ and Poisons the target on 19+.

moves.name: Crunch
moves.effect_text: Crunch lowers the target’s Defense by -1 CS on 17+.

moves.name: Crush Claw
moves.effect_text: Crush Claw lowers the target’s Defense by -1 CS on Even-Numbered Rolls.

moves.name: Crush Grip
moves.effect_text: For every 10% the target is below their full Hit Points, Crush Grip's Damage Base is reduced by 1.

moves.name: Curse
moves.effect_text: If the user is not a Ghost Type, Curse has a Frequency of EOT, and when used the user lowers its Speed by -1 Combat Stage, but raises Attack and Defense by +1 Combat Stage each. If the user is a Ghost Type, Curse has a Frequency of Scene, and when used the user loses 1/3 of their Max Hit Points and a target Pokémon or Trainer within 8 meters of the user becomes Cursed. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented in any way.

moves.name: Cut
moves.effect_text: Cut ignores up to 5 Damage Reduction (Defenses are not Damage Reduction.)

moves.name: Dark Pulse
moves.effect_text: Dark Pulse Flinches the target on 17+.

moves.name: Dark Void
moves.effect_text: The target falls Asleep. Once per Scene, Dark Void may be used as if its range were “Burst 5, Friendly” instead.

moves.name: Dark Void [SM]
moves.effect_text: The target falls Asleep. Once per Scene, Dark Void may be used as if its range were “Burst 5, Friendly” instead.

moves.name: Darkest Lariat
moves.effect_text: This Move ignores the target’s positive Defense Combat Stages and all Damage Reduction.

moves.name: Deadly Strike
moves.effect_text: If Deadly Strike Hits, it is a Critical Hit. Limitation: Not usable by Large Melee Weapons.

moves.name: Decorate
moves.effect_text: The target gains +2 CS in both Attack and Special Attack.

moves.name: Defend Order
moves.effect_text: Raise the user's Defense and Special Defense by +1 CS each.

moves.name: Defense Curl
moves.effect_text: The user becomes Curled Up. While Curled Up, the user becomes immune to Critical Hits and gains 10 Damage Reduction. However, while Curled Up, the user is Slowed and their Accuracy is lowered by -4. The user may stop being Curled Up as a Swift Action. If the user has Rollout or Ice Ball in their Move List, they do not become Slowed while Curled Up. Furthermore, when using the Moves Rollout or Ice Ball while Curled Up, the user gains a +10 bonus to the damage rolls of those Moves and does not suffer Accuracy Penalties from being Curled Up. September Playtest: The user’s Defense is raised 1 Combat Stage and they become Curled Up until the end of the Scene or they are Recalled or Take a Breather. When using the Moves Rollout or Ice Ball while Curled Up, the user gains a +10 bonus to the damage rolls of those Moves.

moves.name: Defog
moves.effect_text: The Weather becomes Clear, and all Blessings, Coats, and Hazards are destroyed. Clear Weather is the default weather, conferring no bonuses or penalties of any sort.

moves.name: Destiny Bond
moves.effect_text: All enemy targets in the burst become Bound to the user until the end of your next turn. If a Bound target causes the user to Faint through a Damaging Attack, the Bound target immediately faints after their attack is resolved.

moves.name: Detect
moves.effect_text: If the user is hit by a Move, the user may use Detect. The user is instead not hit by the Move. You do not take any damage nor are you affected by anty of the Move's effects

moves.name: Diamond Storm
moves.effect_text: Diamond Storm raises the User’s Defense by +1 CS on an Even-Numbered Roll.

moves.name: Dig
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: The user shifts 25 meters underground and their turn ends. Resolution Effect: The user may shift horizontally using their burrow or overland speed, and then shifts 25 meters straight up. Upon reaching the surface, the user attacks with Dig, creating a Burst 1. *Grants: Burrow +3

moves.name: Dire Claw
moves.effect_text: Dire Claw is a Critical Hit on a 19+. Dire Claw gives the target a Status ailment on a 15+. If this is triggered, roll 1d3; on 1 the target is Poisoned; on 2 the target is Paralyzed; on 3 the target is Flinched.

moves.name: Dirty Trick
moves.effect_text: You may perform any of the following Dirty Tricks: Hinder, Blind, or Low Blow. You may use each trick only once each Scene per target. Input each Dirty Trick for details.

moves.name: Disable
moves.effect_text: Disable may be used as a Free Action that does not take up a Command whenever the user is hit by a Move. That Move becomes Disabled for the attacker.

moves.name: Disarm
moves.effect_text: You and the target each make opposed Combat or Stealth Checks. If you win, the target’s Held Item (Main Hand or Off-Hand for humans) falls to the ground.

moves.name: Disarming Voice
moves.effect_text: Disarming Voice cannot miss.

moves.name: Discharge
moves.effect_text: Discharge Paralyzes all legal targets on 15+.

moves.name: Disengage
moves.effect_text: You may Shift 1 Meter. Shifting this way does not provoke an Attack of Opportunity.

moves.name: Dive
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: The user moves underwater and its turn ends. The user must be in water at least 10 meters deep to use Dive. While underwater, the user may not be targeted by Moves. Resolution Effect: The user may shift horizontally using their underwater speed, and then may shift straight up until reaching a target. The user then attacks with Dive, creating a Burst 1. *Grants Swim +3

moves.name: Dizzy Punch
moves.effect_text: Dizzy Punch Confuses the target on 17+.

moves.name: Doom Desire
moves.effect_text: Doom Desire does nothing on the turn it is used. At the end of the user's next turn, Doom Desire hits, even if the user if no longer on the field. Doom Desire cannot miss.

moves.name: Double Iron Bash
moves.effect_text: Double Iron Bash Flinches the targets on 15+.

moves.name: Double Team
moves.effect_text: The user gains 3 activations of Double Team. The user may either activate Double Team when being targeted by an attack to increase their Evasion by +2 against that attack or when making an attack to increase their Accuracy by +2 for that attack.

moves.name: Draco Meteor
moves.effect_text: Lower the user's Special Attack by -2 CS after damage.

moves.name: Dragon Ascent
moves.effect_text: The user’s Defense and Special Defense are each lowered by -1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Dragon Breath
moves.effect_text: Dragon Breath Paralyzes the target on 15+.

moves.name: Dragon Dance
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Attack and Speed by +1 CS.

moves.name: Dragon Energy
moves.effect_text: For each 10% of HP the user is missing, Dragon Energy’s Damage Base is reduced by 1.

moves.name: Dragon Rage
moves.effect_text: Dragon Rage causes the target to lose 15 HP. Dragon Rage is Special and interacts with other moves and effects as such (Special Evasion may be applied to avoid it, Mirror Coat can reflect it, etc.).

moves.name: Dragon Rush
moves.effect_text: The target is Pushed 3 Meters. Dragon Rush Flinches the target on 17+.

moves.name: Dragon Tail
moves.effect_text: The target is Pushed 6 meters minus their Weight Class. The target is also Tripped on 15+.

moves.name: Drain Punch
moves.effect_text: After the target takes damage, the user gains HP equal to half of the damage it dealt to the target.

moves.name: Draining Kiss
moves.effect_text: The user gains HP equal to half of the damage the user dealt to the target.

moves.name: Dream Eater
moves.effect_text: Dream Eater can only target Sleeping Pokémon or Trainers. After the target takes damage, the user gains Hit Points equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target. Dream Eater does not wake up sleeping targets.

moves.name: Drill Run
moves.effect_text: Drill Run is a Critical Hit on 18+.

moves.name: Drum Beating
moves.effect_text: The target’s Speed is lowered by 1 CS.

moves.name: Dynamax Cannon
moves.effect_text: The DB of Dynamax Cannon increases by +2 for each positive CS the target has, to a maximum of DB 20.

moves.name: Dynamic Punch
moves.effect_text: Dynamic Punch Confuses the target. Dynamic Punch ignores the target's Evasion if they are Flanked.

moves.name: Earth Power
moves.effect_text: Earth Power lowers the Special Defense of all Legal Targets 1 Combat Stage on 16+.

moves.name: Earthquake
moves.effect_text: Earthquake can hit targets that are underground, including those using the Move Dig. *Grants Groundshaper

moves.name: Echoed Voice
moves.effect_text: If Echoed Voice was used by any Pokémon or Trainer in the Encounter on the previous round, increase its Damage Base by +4. If Echoed Voice was used by any Pokémon or Trainers during both the previous two rounds, increase its Damage Base by +8.

moves.name: Eerie Impulse
moves.effect_text: Lower the target's Special Attack by -2 CS. *Grants Glow.

moves.name: Eerie Spell
moves.effect_text: The user may choose to Disable the target’s last Move used. This effect may only be activated once per Scene.

moves.name: Electric Terrain
moves.effect_text: The field becomes Electrified for 5 rounds. While the field is Electrified, Pokemon and Trainers touching the ground are immune to Sleep, and Electric-Type attacks used by Pokemon and Trainers touching the ground gain a +10 Bonus to Damage Rolls.

moves.name: Electrify
moves.effect_text: Until the end of the user's next turn, the target's damaging Water-Type attacks and Melee attacks of any Type deal Electric-Type Damage instead of their usual Type.

moves.name: Electro Ball
moves.effect_text: When determining the damage dealt by Electro Ball, the user adds its Speed Stat (including CS) in addition to their Special Attack Stat. The target in turn subtracts both its Speed and Special Defense Stats from the damage dealt before applying Type Effectiveness.

moves.name: Electroweb
moves.effect_text: Lower the Speed of all legal targets by -1 CS.

moves.name: Embargo
moves.effect_text: The target cannot use or benefit from held items for the remainder of the encounter. Embargo may only affect one target at a time; if Embargo is used on a new target, the previous target is freed from the effect.

moves.name: Ember
moves.effect_text: Ember Burns the target on 18+. *Grants: Firestarter

moves.name: Encore
moves.effect_text: Roll 1d6. On a result of 1 or 2, the target becomes Confused; on a result of 3 or 4 the target becomes Suppressed; on a result of 5 or 6 the target becomes Enraged.

moves.name: Endeavor
moves.effect_text: The target loses a Tick of Hit Points for each Injury the user has.

moves.name: Endure
moves.effect_text: If the user is hit by a damaging Move, you may use Endure as a Free Action. If the Move would bring Endure's user down to 0 HP or less, Endure's user instead is set to 1 HP.

moves.name: Energy Ball
moves.effect_text: Energy Ball lowers the foe’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage on 17+.

moves.name: Energy Blast
moves.effect_text: You gain +1 Special Attack on 19+.

moves.name: Energy Sphere
moves.effect_text: You gain +1 Special Defense Combat Stage on 19+.

moves.name: Energy Vortex
moves.effect_text: The target is put in a Vortex.

moves.name: Entrainment
moves.effect_text: The target gains one of the user's Abilities for 3 turns.

moves.name: Eruption
moves.effect_text: For each 10% of HP the user is missing, Eruption's Damage Base is reduced by 1. Eruption creates a 1 meter burst, but also affects an area 10 meters tall straight up.

moves.name: Esper Wing
moves.effect_text: Esper Wing is a Critical Hit on an 18+.

moves.name: Expanding Force
moves.effect_text: After Expanding Force is resolved, you may create Psychic Terrain in a Blast 7, centered on the user, that lasts for 5 turns. Any creatures in those spaces are affected as if by the Field Move Psychic Terrain, rather than any other Field Move. This Effect may trigger only once per Scene.

moves.name: Explosion
moves.effect_text: The user's HP is set to -50% of their full HP. This HP loss cannot be prevented or reduced in any way. The user's loyalty toward its trainer may be lowered.

moves.name: Extrasensory
moves.effect_text: Extrasensory Flinches the target on 19+.

moves.name: Facade
moves.effect_text: If the user is afflicted with a Persistent Status Affliction, Facade's Damage Base is doubled to DB 14 (4d10+15 / 40).

moves.name: Fairy Lock
moves.effect_text: All legal targets become Trapped and Slowed while the user remains in the encounter. If the user is switched or knocked out, this effect ends.

moves.name: Fake Out
moves.effect_text: You may only use Fake Out with Priority upon joining an encounter; if you do, Fake Out Flinches the target. Switching out resets the requirement of joining an encounter.

moves.name: Fake Tears
moves.effect_text: Lower the target's Special Defense by -2 CS.

moves.name: False Surrender
moves.effect_text: False Surrender cannot Miss.

moves.name: False Swipe
moves.effect_text: False Swipe's damage cannot bring a target lower than 1 HP.

moves.name: Façade
moves.effect_text: If the user is afflicted with a Persistent Status Affliction, Façade’s Damage Base is doubled to DB 14 (4d10+15 / 40).

moves.name: Feather Dance
moves.effect_text: All legal targets have their Attack lowered 2 Combat Stages.

moves.name: Feint
moves.effect_text: If a foe uses a Move with the Shield Keyword in response to one of your actions, you may activate Feint to cause the triggering Move to Fail. Feint is activated as a Free Action.

moves.name: Feint Attack
moves.effect_text: Feint Attack Cannot Miss.

moves.name: Fell Stinger
moves.effect_text: If the user successfully knocks out the target with Fell Stinger, raise the user's Attack by +2 CS.

moves.name: Fell Stinger [SM]
moves.effect_text: If the user successfully knocks out the target with Fell Stinger, raise the user's Attack by +2 CS.

moves.name: Fiery Dance
moves.effect_text: If Fiery Dance successfully hits a foe, it raises the user's Special Attack by 1 Combat Stage on Even-Numbered Rolls.

moves.name: Fiery Wrath
moves.effect_text: : Fiery Wrath Flinches the target on a 17+. Once per Scene, Fiery Wrath may instead be used as a Fire-Type Move.

moves.name: Final Gambit
moves.effect_text: Final Gambit lowers the user to 0 Hit Points and causes them to Faint. Final Gambit then deals 1 point of damage to the target for every Hit Point lost by the user. Final Gambit does not cause items to activate.

moves.name: Fire Blast
moves.effect_text: Fire Blast burns the target on 19+.

moves.name: Fire Fang
moves.effect_text: Fire Fang Burns or Flinches on 18-19 during Accuracy Check; flip a coin to determine whether the foe becomes Burned or Flinched. On 20 during Accuracy Check, the foe is both Burned and Flinched.

moves.name: Fire Lash
moves.effect_text: The target's Defense is lowered by -1 CS.

moves.name: Fire Pledge
moves.effect_text: If an ally uses Grass Pledge or Water Pledge, you may use Fire Pledge as Priority (Advanced) immediately after their turn to target the same foe. If used in conjunction with Grass Pledge, Fire Hazards are created in a Brust 1 around the target. If used in conjucntion with Water Pledge, a Rainbow is created that lasts for 5 rouns. Counsult the Pledge keyword for additional details.

moves.name: Fire Punch
moves.effect_text: Fire Punch Burns the target on 19+.

moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.effect_text: The target is put in a Vortex. *Grants: Firestarter

moves.name: First Impression
moves.effect_text: You may only use First Impression with Priority upon joining an encounter; if you do, First Impression Flinches the target. Switching out resets the requirement of joining an encounter. .

moves.name: Fishious Rend
moves.effect_text: Against targets with a lower initiative that have not yet acted this round, Fishious Rend deals +10 damage.

moves.name: Fissure
moves.effect_text: Roll 1d100. This roll may not be modified in any way. If you roll X or lower, the target Faints. X is equal to 30 + The User's Level - The Target's Level. *Grants: Groundshaper

moves.name: Flail
moves.effect_text: For each Injury the user has, Flail's Damage Base is increased by +1.

moves.name: Flame Burst
moves.effect_text: Any Trainers or Pokémon cardinally adjacent to the target lose 5 Hit Points

moves.name: Flame Charge
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Speed 1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Flame Wheel
moves.effect_text: Flame Wheel Burns the target on 19+.

moves.name: Flamethrower
moves.effect_text: Flamethrower Burns the target on 19+.

moves.name: Flare Blitz
moves.effect_text: Flare Blitz Burns the target on 19+.

moves.name: Flash
moves.effect_text: Lower the Accuracy of all legal targets by -1. *Grants Glow

moves.name: Flash Cannon
moves.effect_text: Flash Cannon lowers the target's Special Defense by -1 CS on 17+.

moves.name: Flatter
moves.effect_text: Raise the target's Special Attack by +1 CS. Flatter Confuses the target.

moves.name: Fleur Cannon
moves.effect_text: Lower the user’s Special Attack 2 Combat Stages after damage.

moves.name: Fling
moves.effect_text: The user throws a held item, determining the effect of Fling.

moves.name: Flip Turn
moves.effect_text: If Flip Turn successfully hits its target, the user deals damage and then immediately is returned to its Poké Ball in the same turn. A New Pokémon may immediately be sent out. Using Flip Turn lets a Trapped user be recalled.

moves.name: Flirt
moves.effect_text: Make a Charm Check, opposed by the target’s Charm or Focus. If you win, the target is Infatuated with you for one full round. The target automatically fails their Save Check.

moves.name: Floral Healing
moves.effect_text: The target recovers 1/2 their maximum Hit Points. If the Field is Grassy Terrain, the target instead recovers 2/3 their maximum Hit Points.

moves.name: Flower Shield
moves.effect_text: Raise the Defense of all Grass-Type legal targets by +2 CS.

moves.name: Fly
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: The user is moved up 25 meters into the air. Resolution Effect: The user may shift twice while in the air, using their overland or sky speed, and then comes down next to a legal target, and attacks with Fly. *Grants: Sky +3

moves.name: Flying Press
moves.effect_text: Flying Press may deal Flying Type damage if the user wishes. NOTE: If Flying Press is Move Sync'd, it only changes the Fighting Type portion of the Move. You can still only choose between that Type and Flying Type; you cannot shift Flying Press to change the Flying part to another Type.

moves.name: Flying Press [SM]
moves.effect_text: Flying Press may deal Flying Type damage if the user wishes. NOTE: If Flying Press is Move Sync'd, it only changes the Fighting Type portion of the Move. You can still only choose between that Type and Flying Type; you cannot shift Flying Press to change the Flying part to another Type.

moves.name: Focus Blast
moves.effect_text: Focus Blast lowers the target's Special Defense by -1 CS on 18+.

moves.name: Focus Energy
moves.effect_text: The user becomes Pumped. While Pumped, the user's Critical Range is extended by 2, or 18+ if the Critical Range is not otherwise extended. Being switched will cause this effect to end.

moves.name: Focus Punch
moves.effect_text: Use of Focus Punch must be declared as a Priority (Limited) action at the beginning of the round. Nothing happens at this time. At the end of the round, if the target hasn't been hit by an attack dealing damage equal to at least 25% of the user's Maximum Hit Points, the user may Shift and use Focus Punch. Focus Punch's Frequency is not expended if it is negated by an attack.

moves.name: Follow Me
moves.effect_text: Until the end of the user's next turn, all Foes must target the user when using a Move that targets their opponents. This effect ends if the user is Fainted or Switched out.

moves.name: Force Palm
moves.effect_text: Force Palm Paralyzes the target on 18+.

moves.name: Foresight
moves.effect_text: Foresight may be activated as a Swift Action on the user’s turn. For the rest of the turn, the user’s Normal-Type and Fighting-Type Moves can hit and affect Ghost-Type targets, and the user can see through the Illusion Ability, Moves with the Illusion keyword, and effects created by the Illusionist Capability, ignoring all effects from those.

moves.name: Forest's Curse
moves.effect_text: The target gains the Grass Type in addition to its other Types for 5 turns.

moves.name: Foul Play
moves.effect_text: The target reveals its Attack stat. When calculating damage, add the target's Attack stat instead of the user's Attack stat.

moves.name: Freeze Shock
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: The user may shift, then ends their turn. Resolution Effect: The user attacks with Freeze Shock. Freeze Shock paralyzes on 15+.

moves.name: Freeze-Dry
moves.effect_text: When calculating Weakness and Resistance for Freeze-Dry, Water-Typed targets calculate damage as if Water was weak to Ice.

moves.name: Freezing Glare
moves.effect_text: Freezing Glare Freezes the target on a 19+. Once per Scene, Freezing Glare may instead be used as an Ice-Type Move.

moves.name: Frost Breath
moves.effect_text: If Frost Breath hits, it is a Critical Hit. *Grants: Freezer

moves.name: Frustration
moves.effect_text: Frustration's Damage Base is equal to 9 minus the user's Loyalty Value. Using Frustration may make your Pokémon dislike you.

moves.name: Furious Strikes
moves.effect_text: For each hit rolled on your Five Strike roll, the target of the attack has their Evasion reduced by 1 for one full round. Limitation: Melee or Short Ranged Weapons Only

moves.name: Fury Cutter
moves.effect_text: If Fury Cutter is used successfully and consecutively on the same target, the Damage Base is increased by +4; the first hit has a DB of 4; the second hit a DB of 8, the third hit a DB of 12, and the fourth and all further hits have a DB of 16. If Fury Cutter misses or fails to damage its target, its Damage Base resets.

moves.name: Fusion Bolt
moves.effect_text: Fusion Bolt has its Damage Base increased by +3 if Fusion Flare was used this round or last round by any participant of the encounter.

moves.name: Fusion Flare
moves.effect_text: If Fusion Bolt was used this round or last round by any participant of the encounter, Fusion Flare has its Damage Base increased by +3.

moves.name: Future Sight
moves.effect_text: Future Sight does nothing on the turn it is used. At the end of the user's next turn, Future Sight hits, even if the user is no longer on the field. Future Sight cannot miss.

moves.name: Gastro Acid
moves.effect_text: The target's Ability is disabled until the end of the encounter. If the target has more than one ability, you choose one of them to disable.

moves.name: Gear Up
moves.effect_text: All targets with the Plus or Minus Abilities receive +1 Attack and Special Attack Combat Stages.

moves.name: Gear Up [SS]
moves.effect_text: All targets that are Steel-Typed receive +1 Attack and Special Attack Combat Stages

moves.name: Geomancy
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: The user may not shift this round. The user may create as many squares of Rough Terrain as it wants within a Burst 3 as plants burst through the ground, regardless of the surface material. Resolution Effect: Geomancy raises the user's Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by +2 CS.

moves.name: Giga Drain
moves.effect_text: After the target takes damage, the user gains HP equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

moves.name: Glacial Lance
moves.effect_text: Legal targets hit by Glacial Lance are Stuck and Trapped until the end of their next turn.

moves.name: Glaciate
moves.effect_text: All Legal Targets have their Speed lowered 1 Combat Stage. On an Even-Numbered Roll, all Legal Targets on the ground are Slowed.

moves.name: Glare
moves.effect_text: Glare Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: Gouge
moves.effect_text: If both hits of Gouge successfully hit the target, the target gains an Injury. Limitation: Small Melee and Short Ranged Weapons Only

moves.name: Grapple
moves.effect_text: You and the target each make opposed Combat or Athletics Checks. If you win, you and the target each become Grappled, and you gain Dominance in the Grapple. Pokémon and Trainers that are Grappled »» Are Vulnerable »» Cannot take Shift Actions, or any actions that would cause them to Shift. »» Gain a -6 penalty to Accuracy Rolls if targeting anyone outside of the Grapple. »» Additionally, Grapple has other effects on whether the target has or doesn’t have Dominance. If a target begins their turn as a part of a Grapple but with no Dominance, they may choose to contest the Grapple as a Full Action. If they do, all participants make opposed Combat or Athletics Check. Whoever wins then may choose to either continue the Grapple and gain Dominance, or to end the Grapple. If a target has the Phasing or Teleporter Capability, they may also use those to escape from a Grapple on their turn with no check required. If a target begins their turn as part of a Grapple and has Dominance, they may take one of the following actions as a Full Action. »» End the Grapple. »» Secure: They gain a +3 Bonus to the next opposed check they make in the Grapple. »» Attack: They may automatically hit with an Unarmed Struggle Attack. »» Move: They Shift, dragging the other person in the grapple with them. The user’s Movement Capability is lowered by the other grappler’s Weight Class.

moves.name: Grass Knot
moves.effect_text: Grass Knot's Damage Base is equal to twice the target's Weight Class.

moves.name: Grass Pledge
moves.effect_text: If an ally uses Fire Pledge or Water Pledge, you may use Grass Pledge as Priority (Advanced) immediately after their turn to target the same foe. If used in conjunction with Fire Pledge, Fire Hazards are created in a Burst 1 around the target. If used in conjunction with Water Pledge, the target and all foes adjacent to the the target are slowed and have their Speed reduced by 2 Combat Stages. Consult the Pledge keyword for additional details.

moves.name: Grass Whistle
moves.effect_text: The target falls Asleep.

moves.name: Grassy Glide
moves.effect_text: If the user is on Grassy Terrain, Grassy Glide may be used with Priority. After Grassy Glide has been resolved, the user may choose to create Grassy Terrain in the spaces Passed over (including those it started and ended in), that lasts for 5 turns. Any creatures in those spaces are affected as if by the Field Move Grassy Terrain, rather than any other Field Move.

moves.name: Grassy Terrain
moves.effect_text: The area becomes Grassy for 5 rounds. While Grassy, all Pokémon and Trainers standing on the ground recover 1/10th of their maximum Hit Points at the start of every turn, and Grass-Type attacks performed by grounded Pokémon and Trainers gain a +10 bonus to Damage Rolls.

moves.name: Grav Apple
moves.effect_text: The target’s Defense is lowered by 1 CS.

moves.name: Gravity
moves.effect_text: For 5 rounds, the area is considered Warped. While Warped, Moves that involve the user being airborne may not be used. Pokémon cannot use Sky or Levitate Capabilities to end their turn at an altitude higher than 1 meter. Flying-Types and Pokémon with the Ability Levitate are no longer immune to Ground-Type Moves. All Accuracy Rolls receive a +2 Bonus.

moves.name: Growl
moves.effect_text: Lower the Attack of all legal targets by -1 CS.

moves.name: Growth
moves.effect_text: Raise the user's Attack and Special Attack by +1 CS each. If it is Sunny, double the amount of Combat Stages gained. *Grants Inflatable

moves.name: Grudge
moves.effect_text: You may use Grudge as an Interrupt when a Damaging Attack causes the user to faint. Grudge is activated as a Free Action (does not take up a Command.) The attack is resolved as usual, and the user Faints. The attacker that caused the user to Faint becomes Suppressed for the remainder of the encounter; switching and Taking a Breather does not end Suppression when used this way.

moves.name: Guard Split
moves.effect_text: The target loses 5 Defense and 5 Special Defense. If they do, the user gains 5 Damage Reduction. These effects last until the end of the Scene.

moves.name: Guard Swap
moves.effect_text: The user and the target trade Combat Stage values for the Defense Stat, and then for the Special Defense Stat.

moves.name: Guillotine
moves.effect_text: Roll 1d100. This roll may not be modified in any way. If you roll X or lower, the target Faints. X is equal to 30 + The User's Level - The Target's Level.

moves.name: Gunk Shot
moves.effect_text: Gunk Shot Poisons the target on 15+.

moves.name: Gust
moves.effect_text: If the target is airborne as a result of Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, Gust can hit them, ignoring Range and has a Damage Base of 8 instead. *Grants: Guster

moves.name: Gyro Ball
moves.effect_text: The target reveals their Speed Stat (including Combat Stages). If it is higher than the user’s (including Combat Stages), subtract the user’s Speed Stat from the target’s and apply the difference as Bonus Damage.

moves.name: Hail
moves.effect_text: The weather changes to Hail for 5 rounds. While it is Hailing, all non-Ice Type Pokemon lose a Tick of Hit Points at the beginning of their turn.

moves.name: Hammer Arm
moves.effect_text: The user lowers their Speed by -1 CS.

moves.name: Harden
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Defense by +1 CS.

moves.name: Haze
moves.effect_text: The Combat Stages of the user and all Pokémon and Trainers in the encounter are set to their default state (usually 0).

moves.name: Head Charge
moves.effect_text: The target is Pushed back 2 meters.

moves.name: Head Smash
moves.effect_text: The target is pushed 2 meters.

moves.name: Headbutt
moves.effect_text: Headbutt Flinches the target on 15+.

moves.name: Headlong Rush
moves.effect_text: The user’s Defense and Special Defense are each lowered by -1 Combat Stage. Headlong Rush may be used as a Free Action at the end of a Sprint Maneuver taken as a Standard Action, as long as the user Shifted at least 3 meters in a straight line towards the target. When used this way, Headlong Rush Trips the target on a hit.

moves.name: Heal Bell
moves.effect_text: All targets are cured of any Persistent Status ailments.

moves.name: Heal Block
moves.effect_text: Until the end of the encounter, the target may not gain HP or Temporary HP from any source. This effect ends if the target is switched out or Takes a Breather.

moves.name: Heal Order
moves.effect_text: The user regains HP equal to half of its full HP.

moves.name: Heal Pulse
moves.effect_text: Restores 50% of the target’s max Hit Points. Heal Pulse’s user may not target itself with Heal Pulse.

moves.name: Healing Wish
moves.effect_text: The user immediately Faints, lowering its HP to 0. The user takes no Injuries from HP Markers when using Healing Wish. The target is immediately cured of up to 3 injuries, healed to their Maximum Hit Points, and has the Frequency of all Moves restored. Healing Wish may target a Pokémon in a Poké Ball. Healing Wish does not restore the Frequency of Healing Wish or Lunar Dance. Injuries healed through Healing Wish count toward the total number of Injuries that can be healed each day, and this healing is limited by the same.

moves.name: Heart Stamp
moves.effect_text: Heart Stamp Flinches the target on 15+.

moves.name: Heart Swap
moves.effect_text: The targets trade Combat Stage values for each stat.

moves.name: Heat Crash
moves.effect_text: For each weight class the user is above the target, increase Heavy Crash's damage base by +2.

moves.name: Heat Wave
moves.effect_text: Heat Wave Burns all Legal Targets on 18+.

moves.name: Heavy Slam
moves.effect_text: For each weight class the user is above the target, increase Heavy Slam's Damage Base by +2.

moves.name: Helping Hand
moves.effect_text: Helping Hand grants the target +2 on its next Accuracy Roll this round, and +10 to its next Damage Roll this round.

moves.name: Hex
moves.effect_text: Once a Scene, if Hex's target has a Status Affliction, you may have Hex's Damage Base be 13 instead (4d10+10 / 35)

moves.name: Hidden Power
moves.effect_text: When a Pokémon first obtains the Move Hidden Power, roll 1d20. Hidden Power’s Elemental Type will be changed from Normal to Bug on a result of 1; Dark on 2; Dragon on 3; Electric on 4; Fairy on 5; Fighting on 6; Fire on 7; Flying on 8; Ghost on 9; Grass on 10; Ground on 11; Ice on 12; Normal on 13; Poison on 14; Psychic on 15; Rock on 16; Steel on 17; Water on 18; and on 19 or 20, reroll until you roll another number. This effect is permanent – if Hidden Power is forgotten and relearned, the chosen Type remains the same.

moves.name: High Horsepower
moves.effect_text: High Horsepower may be used as a Free Action at the end of a Sprint Maneuver taken as a Standard Action, as long as the user Shifted at least 3 meters in a straight line towards the target. When used this way, High Horsepower gains Smite.

moves.name: High Jump Kick
moves.effect_text: If High Jump Kick misses, the user loses Hit Points equal to 1/4th of their Max Hit Points. A failure to hit due to a Move with the Shield keyword does not count as a miss. This cannot be used if Gravity is in effect.

moves.name: Hinder
moves.effect_text: You and the target make Opposed Athletics Checks. If you win, the target is Slowed and takes a -2 penalty to all Skill Checks for one full round.

moves.name: Hold Hands
moves.effect_text: Both the user and the target become Cheered. They may give up the Cheered condition when making a Save Check to roll twice and take the best result. September Playtest: The target and the user each gain three Ticks of Temporary Hit Points, and a +2 Bonus to Save Checks for 1 full round.

moves.name: Hone Claws
moves.effect_text: Raise the user's Attack by +1 CS and Accuracy by +1.

moves.name: Horn Drill
moves.effect_text: Roll 1d100. This roll may not be modified in any way. If you roll X or lower, the target Faints. X is equal to 30 + The User's Level - The Target's Level.

moves.name: Horn Leech
moves.effect_text: After the target takes damage, the user gains HP equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

moves.name: Howl
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Attack by +1 CS.

moves.name: Howl [SS]
moves.effect_text: The user and all allies in the Burst have their Attack CS raised by 1.

moves.name: Hurricane
moves.effect_text: Hurricane Confuses its target on 15+. If the target is in Sunny Weather, Hurricane's Accuracy Check is 11. If the target is in Rainy Weather, Hurricane cannot miss. If the target is airborne as a result of Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, Hurricane cannot miss.

moves.name: Hydro Pump
moves.effect_text: The target is pushed away from the user 3 meters.

moves.name: Hyper Fang
moves.effect_text: Hyper Fang Flinches the target on 19+.

moves.name: Hyper Voice
moves.effect_text: All legal targets are pushed back to the squares immediately outside the blast, away from the user.

moves.name: Hyperspace Fury
moves.effect_text: Interrupts may not be triggered against Hyperspace Fury. The user's Defense is lowered by -1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Hyperspace Hole
moves.effect_text: Make and resolve of Hyperspace Hole’s attacks separately. In between each attack, the user may Shift using their Teleporter capability, ending the Shift next to a legal target. Interrupts may not be triggered against Hyperspace Hole..

moves.name: Hypnosis
moves.effect_text: The target falls Asleep.

moves.name: Ice Ball
moves.effect_text: The user continues to use Ice Ball on each of its turns until they miss any target with Ice Ball or are not able to hit any target with Ice Ball during their turn. Each successive use of Ice Ball increases Ice Ball's Damage Base by +3 to a maximum of DB 15.

moves.name: Ice Beam
moves.effect_text: Ice Beam Freezes on 19+.

moves.name: Ice Burn
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: The user may shift, then ends their turn. Resolution Effect: The user attacks with Ice Burn. Ice Burn Burns on 15+.

moves.name: Ice Fang
moves.effect_text: Ice Fang Freezes or Flinches on 18-19 during Accuracy Check; flip a coin to determine whether the foe becomes Frozen or Flinched. On 20 during Accuracy Check, the foe is both Frozen and Flinched.

moves.name: Ice Hammer
moves.effect_text: Lower the user's Speed by -1 CS.

moves.name: Ice Punch
moves.effect_text: Ice Punch Freezes the target on 19+.

moves.name: Icicle Crash
moves.effect_text: Icicle Crash Flinches the target on 15+.

moves.name: Icy Wind
moves.effect_text: All Legal Targets have their Speed lowered 1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Imprison
moves.effect_text: The target is Locked for the rest of the Scene. A Locked target may not use any Moves the user knows. Imprison cannot miss.

moves.name: Incinerate
moves.effect_text: If a target is holding a Held Item or Main or Off-Hand item, they must either drop it immediately or lose a Tick of Hit Points. This may only cause a target to lose at most one Tick of Hit Points, no matter how many items they were holding

moves.name: Infernal Parade
moves.effect_text: Legal targets hit by Infernal Parade are Burned on a 17+. Once a Scene, if at least one of Infernal Parade’s targets has a Status Condition, you may have Infernal Parade’s Damage Base be 12 instead (3d12+10 / 30).

moves.name: Inferno
moves.effect_text: Inferno Burns the target. Inferno ignores the target's Evasion if there are no other combatants or Rough or Blocking Terrain within 2 meters of the target.

moves.name: Infestation
moves.effect_text: The target is put in a Vortex.

moves.name: Ingrain
moves.effect_text: Ingrain applies a Coat to the user, which has the following effect; the user cannot be pushed or pulled, and cannot be switched out. At the beginning of each of the user's turn, the user gains HP equal to 1/10th of its max HP.

moves.name: Instruct
moves.effect_text: The target immediately reuses the attack it performed last, ignoring frequency, as a Free Action. They may choose new targets for the copied attack. Instruct may not be used if the Target’s last Move was a Set-Up Move, a Trigger Move, or Instruct, or if the Target is currently affected by Exhaust.

moves.name: Intercept Melee
moves.effect_text: Trigger: An ally within Movement range is hit by an adjacent foe. Effect: You must make an Acrobatics or Athletics Check, with a DC equal to three times the number of meters they have to move to reach the triggering Ally; If you succeed, you Push the triggering Ally 1 Meter away from you, and Shift to occupy their space, and are hit by the triggering attack. On Failure to make the Check, the user still Shifts a number of meters equal a third of their check result. Note: If the target that was Intercepted was hit by an Area of Effect Move, and the 1 meter push does not remove them from the Area of Effect, the Intercept has no effect since they are still in the area of the attack – it would cause the Interceptor to be hit by the Move however. Special: Pokemon must have a Loyalty of 3 or greater to make Intercept Melee and Intercept range Maneuvers and may only Intercept attacks against their Trainer. At Loyalty 6, Pokemon may Intercept for any Ally. Additional Rules »» Pokémon and Trainers may only Intercept against Priority and Interrupt Moves if they are faster than the user of those Moves. »» Moves that cannot miss (such as Aura Sphere or Swift) cannot be Intercepted. »» Pokémon and Trainers cannot attempt Intercepts if they are Asleep, Confused, Enraged, Frozen, Stuck, Paralyzed, or otherwise unable to move. »» Intercepts may not be used to move the Intercepting Pokémon or Trainer OUT of the way of an attack. They will always be hit, regardless.

moves.name: Intercept Ranged
moves.effect_text: Trigger: A Ranged X-Target attack passes within your Movement Range. Effect: Select a Square within your Movement Range that lies directly between the source of the attack and the target of the attack. Make an Acrobatics or Athletics Check; you may Shift a number of Meters equal to half the result towards the chosen square. If you succeed, you take the attack instead of its intended target. If you fail, you still Shift a number of Meters equal to half the result. Special: Pokemon must have a Loyalty of 3 or greater to make Intercept Melee and Intercept range Maneuvers and may only Intercept attacks against their Trainer. At Loyalty 6, Pokemon may Intercept for any Ally. Additional Rules »» Pokémon and Trainers may only Intercept against Priority and Interrupt Moves if they are faster than the user of those Moves. »» Moves that cannot miss (such as Aura Sphere or Swift) cannot be Intercepted. »» Pokémon and Trainers cannot attempt Intercepts if they are Asleep, Confused, Enraged, Frozen, Stuck, Paralyzed, or otherwise unable to move. »» Intercepts may not be used to move the Intercepting Pokémon or Trainer OUT of the way of an attack. They will always be hit, regardless.

moves.name: Ion Deluge
moves.effect_text: An ion cloud is dispersed in the targeted area. All Normal-Type Moves targeting into or originating from the area become Electric-Type Moves.

moves.name: Iron Defense
moves.effect_text: Raise the user's Defense by +2 CS.

moves.name: Iron Head
moves.effect_text: Iron Head Flinches the target on 15+.

moves.name: Iron Tail
moves.effect_text: Iron Tail lowers the target’s Defense by -1 CS on 19+.

moves.name: Jaw Lock
moves.effect_text: You may perform a Grapple Maneuver against the target as a Free Action.

moves.name: Judgement
moves.effect_text: Judgment's Type can be whatever Elemental Type the user wants it to be.

moves.name: Jump Kick
moves.effect_text: If Jump Kick misses, the user loses Hit Points equal to 1/4th of their Max Hit Points. A failure to hit due to a Move with the Shield keyword does not count as a miss. This cannot be used if Gravity is in effect.

moves.name: Jungle Healing
moves.effect_text: The user and any allies in the burst regain Hit Points equal to 1/4 of their Maximum Hit Point Value, and are cured of any Persistent or Volatile Status Conditions.

moves.name: Karate Chop
moves.effect_text: Karate Chop is a Critical Hit on 17+.

moves.name: Kinesis
moves.effect_text: If the user or an Ally within 6 meters is about to be hit by an attack, the user may use Kinesis as an interrupt. The triggering Accuracy Roll receives a -4 penalty. This may cause Moves to miss.

moves.name: King's Shield
moves.effect_text: If the user is hit by an attack, the user may use King’s Shield. The user is instead not hit by the Move. You do not take any damage nor are you affected by any of the Move’s effects. In addition, if the triggering attack was Melee ranged, the attacker’s Attack is lowered by -2 CS.

moves.name: Knock Off
moves.effect_text: Choose one of the target's Held Items or Accessory Slot Items. It is knocked to the ground.

moves.name: Land's Wrath
moves.effect_text: *Grants: Groundshaper

moves.name: Laser Focus
moves.effect_text: The next succesful damaging attack made by the user is automatically a Critical Hit.

moves.name: Lash Out
moves.effect_text: If the user has lost CS from a source other than itself since the end of its last turn, Lash Out is instead DB 15 (4d10 + 20 / 45). Any given foe may be the target of this increased damage only once per Scene.

moves.name: Last Resort
moves.effect_text: Last Resort can only be used after the user has performed 5 other different Moves in its Move List during a single fight, without being switched out.

moves.name: Lava Plume
moves.effect_text: Lava Plume burns all targets on 16+.

moves.name: Leaf Blade
moves.effect_text: Leaf Blade is a Critical Hit on 18+.

moves.name: Leaf Storm
moves.effect_text: Lower the user’s Special Attack 2 Combat Stages after damage.

moves.name: Leaf Tornado
moves.effect_text: Small or Medium targets in the central square of the blast are not hit. On 15+, all legal targets have their Accuracy lowered by -1.

moves.name: Leech Life
moves.effect_text: After the target takes damage, the user gains HP equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

moves.name: Leech Life [SM]
moves.effect_text: After the target takes damage, the user gains HP equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

moves.name: Leech Seed
moves.effect_text: At the beginning of each of the target's turns, Leech Seed's target loses 1/10th of their full HP. Leech Seed's user then gains HP equal to the amount the target lost. Leech Seed lasts until the target faints or is returned to a Poké Ball. Grass Types and targets immune to Grass Attacks are immune to Leech Seed

moves.name: Leer
moves.effect_text: All legal targets have their Defense lowered by -1 CS.

moves.name: Lick
moves.effect_text: Lick Paralyzes the target on 15+.

moves.name: Life Dew
moves.effect_text: The user and all allies in the burst regain Hit Points equal to 1/4 of their Maximum Hit Points.

moves.name: Light Screen
moves.effect_text: Blessing – Any user affected by Light Screen may activate it when receiving Special Damage to resist the Damage one step. Light Screen may be activated 2 times, and then disappears.

moves.name: Liquidation
moves.effect_text: The target's Defense is lowered by -1 CS on 17+.

moves.name: Lock-On
moves.effect_text: The target is Locked-On. The next Move that the user uses against the Target that requires an Accuracy Check cannot miss. Lock-On's effect, on both the User and Target, can be passed by Baton Pass.

moves.name: Lovely Kiss
moves.effect_text: The target fall Asleep.

moves.name: Low Blow
moves.effect_text: You and the target make Opposed Acrobatics Checks. If you win, the target is Vulnerable and has their Initiative set to 0 until the end of your next turn.

moves.name: Low Kick
moves.effect_text: Low Kick's Damage Base is equal to twice the target's Weight Class.

moves.name: Low Sweep
moves.effect_text: Lower the target’s Speed by -1 CS.

moves.name: Lucky Chant
moves.effect_text: Any user affected by Lucky Chant may activate it when receiving a Critical Hit to cause the attack to instead deal damage as if it was not a Critical Hit. Lucky Chant may be activated 3 times and then disappears.

moves.name: Lunar Blessing
moves.effect_text: The user regains hit points equal to 50% of its Hit Point total, cures all of its Status conditions, and gains +2 Evasion.

moves.name: Lunar Dance
moves.effect_text: The user immediately Faints, lowering its Hit Points to 0. The user takes no Injuries from Hit Point Markers when using Lunar Dance. The target is immediately cured of up to 3 injuries, healed to their Maximum Hit Points, and has the Frequency of all Moves restored. Lunar Dance may target a Pokémon in a Poké Ball. Lunar Dance does not restore the Frequency of Healing Wish or Lunar Dance. Injuries healed through Lunar Dance count toward the total number of Injuries that can be healed each day, and this healing is limited by the same.

moves.name: Lunge
moves.effect_text: Lunge may be used as a Free Action at the end of a Sprint Maneuver taken as a Standard Action, as long as the user Shifted at least 3 meters in a straight line towards the target. When used this way, Lunge's target receives a -5 penalty to damage rolls for 1 round.

moves.name: Luster Purge
moves.effect_text: Luster Purge lowers the target's Special Defense by -1 CS on an Even-Numbered Roll.

moves.name: Magic Burst
moves.effect_text: Foes hit by Magic Burst can’t make Attacks of Opportunity for 1 full round. Limitation: Melee Weapons Only

moves.name: Magic Coat
moves.effect_text: If the user is about to get a hit by a Move that does not have a Damage Dice Roll, they may use Magic Coat as an Interrupt. The Interrupted Move’s user is treated as if they were the target of their own Move, with the user of Magic Coat as the user.

moves.name: Magic Powder
moves.effect_text: The target gains the Psychic Type in addition to its other Types for 5 turns.

moves.name: Magic Room
moves.effect_text: The area becomes Useless for 5 rounds. While Useless, Pokémon may not benefit from the effects of any Held Items, and Trainers cannot benefit from any Accessory-Slot equipment. This does not affect consumable or activated items, only Items with Static effects or Triggers.

moves.name: Magical Leaf
moves.effect_text: Magical Leaf cannot miss.

moves.name: Magma Storm
moves.effect_text: The target is put in a Vortex; this effect occurs even if Magma Storm misses its target.

moves.name: Magnet Bomb
moves.effect_text: Magnet Bomb cannot miss. *Grants Magnetic

moves.name: Magnet Rise
moves.effect_text: The user gains the Levitate Ability for 5 turns. Magnet Rise may be activated as a Swift Action if the user is otherwise given an action that consumes a Command.

moves.name: Magnetic Flux
moves.effect_text: Raise the Defense and Special Defense of all legal targets with the Minus or Plus Abilities by +1 CS.

moves.name: Magnetic Flux [SM]
moves.effect_text: Raise the Defense and Special Defense of all legal targets with the Minus or Plus Abilities by +1 CS.

moves.name: Magnetic Flux [SS]
moves.effect_text: Choose +1 or -1. All targets that are Electric-Type or have the Magnetic Capability receive that many Defense and Special Defense Combat Stages.

moves.name: Magnitude
moves.effect_text: When you use Magnitude, roll 1d6. Magnitude’s Damage Base is equal to 5+X, where X is the value of the d6. Magnitude can hit targets that are underground, including those using the Move Dig. *Grants: Groundshaper

moves.name: Maneuver
moves.effect_text: Effects

moves.name: Manipulate
moves.effect_text: You may perform any of the following Manipulations: Bon Mot, Flirt, or Terrorize. You may use each Manipulation only once each Scene per target. Manipulate can only be performed by Trainers. Input each Manipulation for details.

moves.name: Mat Block
moves.effect_text: If the user or an adjacent ally is hit by a damagin attack, the user may use Mat Block. The attack instead does not hit any targets, and it deals no damage and has no effects. You may only use Mat Block during the first round of an encounter

moves.name: Maul
moves.effect_text: The target is Flinched. Limitation: Melee Weapons Only

moves.name: Me First
moves.effect_text: If an opponent declares a Damaging Attack against the user, and Me First’s user has a higher Speed stat then the target, the user may use Me First as an Interrupt. The User will then use the same Move the triggering foe was about to use on that foe.

moves.name: Mean Look
moves.effect_text: The Target becomes Trapped and Slowed for the remainder of the encounter.

moves.name: Meditate
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Mega Drain
moves.effect_text: After the target takes damage, the user gains HP equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

moves.name: Mega Kick
moves.effect_text: The target is Pushed 2 meters.

moves.name: Megahorn
moves.effect_text: The target is Pushed 1 meter.

moves.name: Memento
moves.effect_text: Memento may be used as a Free Action that does not consume a Command action when the user becomes Fainted. Lower each of the target's stats by -2 CS.

moves.name: Metal Burst
moves.effect_text: Metal Burst causes all legal targets in the burst to lose HP equal to the total amount of direct Damage the user has taken since the beginning of this Round. Metal Burst cannot miss.

moves.name: Metal Claw
moves.effect_text: Raise the user's Attack by +1 CS on 18+.

moves.name: Metal Sound
moves.effect_text: All Legal Targets have their Special Defense lowered by -2 CS.

moves.name: Meteor Beam
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: The user’s Special Attack is raised by by +1 Combat Stage. Resolution Effect: The user attacks with Meteor Beam.

moves.name: Meteor Mash
moves.effect_text: Raise the user's Attack by +1 CS on 15+.

moves.name: Metronome
moves.effect_text: Metronome randomly uses any other Move except for After You, Assist, Bestow, Copycat, Counter, Covet, Crafty Shield, Destiny Bond, Detect, Endure, Feint, Focus Punch, Follow Me, Helping Hand, King’s Shield, Metronome, Me First, Mimic, Mirror Coat, Mirror Move, Protect, Quash, Quick Guard, Rage Powder, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Snatch, Snore, Spiky Shield, Switcheroo, Thief, Transform, Trick, and Wide Guard. The GM helps to pick the random Move.

moves.name: Milk Drink
moves.effect_text: The target regains HP equal to half of its full HP. The user may target themselves with Milk Drink.

moves.name: Mimic
moves.effect_text: Choose a Move that the target has used during the encounter. For the remainder of the encounter, that Move replaces Mimic on the user’s Move List. Mimic cannot miss.

moves.name: Mind Blown
moves.effect_text: The user's Hit Points are reduced by 50% of their full Hit Point Value. This hit point loss cannot be prevented or reduced in any way.

moves.name: Mind Reader
moves.effect_text: The target becomes Read to the user until the end of the user’s next turn. The user may end this effect when making an Attack on the user, causing that attack to automatically hit; OR when the Read target uses an Attack against the user, causing that attack to automatically miss. If the user has the Telepathy Capability, the user automatically succeeds on a mindreading attempt against the target, and may listen to the target’s surface thoughts as long as they remain Read. Mind Reader automatically misses against targets with the Mindlock Capability.

moves.name: Minimize
moves.effect_text: The user gains +4 Evasion, and the user's size is lowered to Small for the remainder of the encounter. *Grants Shrinkable

moves.name: Miracle Eye
moves.effect_text: Miracle Eye may be activated as a Swift Action on the user’s turn. For the rest of the turn, the user’s Psychic-Type Moves can hit and affect Dark-Type targets, and the user can see through the Illusion Ability, Moves with the Illusion keyword, and effects created by the Illusionist Capability, ignoring all effects from those.

moves.name: Mirror Coat
moves.effect_text: Mirror Coat may be used as a Reaction when the user is hit by a damaging Special Attack. Resolve the Triggering Attack, with Mirror Coat’s user resisting the attack one step further. After the attack is resolved, if Mirror Coat’s user was not Fainted, the triggering foe then loses Hit Points equal to twice the amount of Hit Points lost by the user from the triggering attack. Note that Mirror Coat is Special, and while it cannot miss, it cannot hit targets immune to Psychic-Type Moves.

moves.name: Mirror Move
moves.effect_text: Use the Move the target has used on their last turn. You may choose new targets for the Move. Mirror Move cannot miss.

moves.name: Mirror Shot
moves.effect_text: All Legal Targets have their Accuracy lowered by -2 on 16+.

moves.name: Mist
moves.effect_text: Any user affected by Mist may activate it when having Combat Stages lowered by any effect; if they do, those Combat Stages are instead not lowered. Mist may be activated 3 times and then disappears.

moves.name: Mist Ball
moves.effect_text: Mist Ball lowers the target’s Special Attack by 1 Combat Stage on an Even-Numbered Roll.

moves.name: Misty Explosion
moves.effect_text: The user’s Hit Points are set to -50% of their full Hit Point value. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented or reduced in any way. After Misty Explosion is resolved, create Misty Terrain in a Blast 7, centered on the user, that lasts for 5 turns. Any creatures in those spaces are affected as if by the Field Move Misty Terrain, rather than any other Field Move.

moves.name: Misty Terrain
moves.effect_text: The area becomes Misty for 5 turns, While Misty, all Pokemon and Traners standing on the ground ignore the first turn of all Status Afflictions, and Dragon-type attacks targeting or origination from a grounded Pokemon or Trainer take a -10 Penalty to Damage Rolls.

moves.name: Moonblast
moves.effect_text: Moonblast lowers the target’s Special Attack by -1 CS on 15+.

moves.name: Moongeist Beam
moves.effect_text: This Move ignores any Abilities that would cause it to fail or miss; those Abilities cannot be activated in response to Moongeist Beam (ex: Dodge, Wonder Guard)

moves.name: Moonlight
moves.effect_text: The user regains HP equal to half of its full HP. If it is Sunny, the user gains 2/3 of its full HP. If it is Rainy, Sand Storming, or Hailing, the user gains 1/4 of its full HP.

moves.name: Morning Sun
moves.effect_text: The user regains Hit Points equal to half of its full Hit Point value. If it is Sunny, the user gains 2/3 of its full Hit Point value. If it is Rainy, Sand Storming or Hailing the user gains 1/4 of their full Hit Point value.

moves.name: Mountain Gale
moves.effect_text: The target is Flinched on a 15+.

moves.name: Mud Bomb
moves.effect_text: The target's Accuracy is lowered by -1 on 16+.

moves.name: Mud Shot
moves.effect_text: The target's Speed is lowed by -1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Mud Sport
moves.effect_text: All targets in the burst, including the user, gain a Coat which grants them 1 Step of Resistance to Electric Type Moves. After a target has been hit by a damaging Electric Type Move, the coat is removed.

moves.name: Mud-Slap
moves.effect_text: The target's Accuracy is lowered by -1.

moves.name: Muddy Water
moves.effect_text: As a Shift Action, the user may Move to any open square in Muddy Water’s area of effect without provoking any Attacks of Opportunity. On 16+, the Accuracy of all targets is lowered by 1.

moves.name: Multi-Attack
moves.effect_text: Multi-Attack’s Type is determined by the Memory Disc, Plate, or Drive Item held.

moves.name: Multi-Attack [SS]
moves.effect_text: Multi-Attack’s Type is determined by the Memory Disc, Plate, or Drive Item held.

moves.name: Mystical Fire
moves.effect_text: Mystical Fire lowers the target’s Special Attack by 1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Mystical Power
moves.effect_text: The user receives +1 Combat Stage in their highest non-HP stat.

moves.name: Name
moves.effect_text: Effects

moves.name: Nasty Plot
moves.effect_text: Raise the user's Special Attack by +2 CS.

moves.name: Natural Gift
moves.effect_text: Refer to the Move Keywords Berry list. Natural Gift deals damage according to the Berry list and Natural Gift’s Type is also defined there. The Berry’s Digestion/Food Buff is nullified and is not used.

moves.name: Nature Power
moves.effect_text: Nature Power uses a Move defined by the Environ keyword.

moves.name: Nature's Madness
moves.effect_text: The target loses half of their current Hit Points.

moves.name: Needle Arm
moves.effect_text: Needle Arm Flinches the target on 15+.

moves.name: Night Daze
moves.effect_text: Night Daze lowers the target's Accuracy by -1 on 13+.

moves.name: Night Shade
moves.effect_text: The target loses HP equal to the level of Night Shade's user. Do not apply weakness or resistance. Do not apply stats.

moves.name: Night Slash
moves.effect_text: Night Slash is a Critical Hit on 18+.

moves.name: Nightmare
moves.effect_text: Nightmare can only hit Legal Targets that are Asleep. The target gains Bad Sleep.

moves.name: No Retreat
