moves.effect_text: The user gains +1 CS in each stat. In addition, the user may not be recalled or switched out until the end of the Scene, and counts as Slowed for the purposes of any movement that would end further away from the nearest enemy than the user started.

moves.name: Noble Roar
moves.effect_text: Noble Roar lowers all legal targets’ Attack and Special Attack by +1 CS.

moves.name: Nuzzle
moves.effect_text: Nuzzle Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: Oblivion Wing
moves.effect_text: The user gains HP equal to Oblivion Wing’s Damage Roll.

moves.name: Obstruct
moves.effect_text: If the user is hit by a Move, the user may use Obstruct. The user is instead not hit by the Move. You do not take any damage nor are you affected by any of the Move’s effects. In addition, if the triggering attack was Melee ranged, the attacker’s Defense is lowered by 2 Combat Stages.

moves.name: Octazooka
moves.effect_text: Octazooka lowers the target's Accuracy by -1 on an Even-Numbered Roll.

moves.name: Octolock
moves.effect_text: The user initiates a Grapple Maneuver with the target, which automatically hits. If successful, until the user no longer has Dominance in the grapple, the target is Trapped and loses 1 CS in Defense and Special Defense at the end of each of their turns.

moves.name: Odor Sleuth
moves.effect_text: Odor Sleuth may be activated as a Swift Action on the user’s turn. For the rest of the turn, the user’s Normal-Type and Fighting-Type Moves can hit and affect Ghost-Type targets, and the user can see through the Illusion Ability, Moves with the Illusion keyword, and effects created by the Illusionist Capability, ignoring all effects from those.

moves.name: Ominous Wind
moves.effect_text: The user has each of its stats raised by +1 CS on a 19+.

moves.name: Outrage
moves.effect_text: Outrage makes the user becomes Enraged and Confused after damage is dealt.

moves.name: Overheat
moves.effect_text: Lower the user's Special Attack 2 Combat Stages after damage.

moves.name: Pain Split
moves.effect_text: The user and the target both lose 1/2 of their current Hit Points. Add the amount of Hit Points the user and the target lost together, and divide the value by 2. Both the target and the user gain Hit Points equal to this value. Do not add Injuries from Pain Split from Hit Point Markers until the full effect of the Move has been resolved. Pain Split never causes Massive Damage. Hit Point loss from Pain Split cannot be prevented in any way.

moves.name: Parabolic Charge
moves.effect_text: The user gains HP equal to half of the total damage the user dealt to all legal targets.

moves.name: Parabolic Charge [SM]
moves.effect_text: The user gains HP equal to half of the total damage the user dealt to all legal targets.

moves.name: Parting Shot
moves.effect_text: If Parting Shot successfully hits, the target's Attack and Special Attack stats are lowered by one CS and the user is immediately recalled in the same turn. A new Pokemon may immediately be sent out. using Parting Shot lets a Trapped user be recalled.

moves.name: Pay Day
moves.effect_text: Pay Day scatters metal coins equal in value to 1d8 times the user's level. If it is a trainer battle, the winner of the battle gets to pick up the coins.

moves.name: Payback
moves.effect_text: If the target hit the user with a Damaging Move on the previous turn, Payback has a Damage Base of 10 (3d8+10 / 24) instead.

moves.name: Perish Song
moves.effect_text: Perish Song cannot miss. All targets, including the user, receive a Perish Count of 3. At the beginning of each of the target’s turns, their Perish count is lowered by 1. Once a Perish Count reaches 0, set the Pokémon’s Hit Points to 0. A Perish Count disappears if a target returns to their Poké Ball, Takes a Breather, or is knocked out. Perish Song never causes Massive Damage.

moves.name: Petal Dance
moves.effect_text: After damage is dealt, the user becomes Enraged and Confused.

moves.name: Phantom Force
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: The user is removed from the field, and their turn ends. Resolution Effect: Phantom Force’s user appears adjacent to any legal target on the field, ignoring Movement Capabilities, and then uses Phantom Force’s attack. Phantom Force cannot be avoided by Moves with the Shield Keyword, the Dodge Ability, or similar effects, and Intercepts may not be attempted in response.

moves.name: Photon Geyser
moves.effect_text: This attack uses the highest of the user’s Attack or Special Attack Stat, though it remains a Special Move. This Move ignores any Abilities that would cause it to fail or miss, such as Dodge or Wonder Guard; those Abilities cannot be activated in response to Photon Geyser.

moves.name: Pierce!
moves.effect_text: Pierce deals an additional +10 damage against targets with Damage Reduction.

moves.name: Plasma Fists
moves.effect_text: The Target's next damaging Normal Type Move instead becomes Electric Type.

moves.name: Play Nice
moves.effect_text: Play Nice lowers the target’s Attack by -1 CS.

moves.name: Play Rough
moves.effect_text: Play Rough lowers the target’s Attack by -1 CS on 17+.

moves.name: Pluck
moves.effect_text: Pluck takes the target's Held Item or Accessory Slot Item and attaches it to Pluck's user, if the user is not holding anything.

moves.name: Poison Fang
moves.effect_text: Poison Fang Badly Poisons the target on 17+.

moves.name: Poison Gas
moves.effect_text: Poison Gas Poisons all legal targets.

moves.name: Poison Jab
moves.effect_text: Poison Jab Poisons the target on 15+.

moves.name: Poison Powder
moves.effect_text: The target is Poisoned.

moves.name: Poison Sting
moves.effect_text: Poison Sting Poisons the target on 17+.

moves.name: Poison Tail
moves.effect_text: Poison Tail is a Critical Hit on 18+ and Poisons the target on 19+.

moves.name: Pollen Puff
moves.effect_text: Once per Scene, Pollen Puff may instead be used on an ally; when used this way, the target recovers 1/2 of their maximum Hit Points and the Move has the Healing keyword.

moves.name: Poltergeist
moves.effect_text: If a target is holding a Held Item or Main or OffHand item, they must either drop it immediately or lose a Tick of Hit Points. This may only cause a target to lose at most one Tick of Hit Points, no matter how many items they were holding. On each of the target’s subsequent turns, if it is still holding the item(s) in question it loses a Tick of Hit Points.

moves.name: Powder
moves.effect_text: The target is dusted with a Coat of flammable powder. If the affected target uses a damaging Fire-Type attack, the attack is negated and instead creates a Blast 3 centered on itself as the powder explodes, and the Coat is removed. All legal targets within the Blast take damage equal to what the user of the Fire-Type attack would roll for the damage of their attack. This damage is Typeless or Fire-Type, whichever would be more effective.

moves.name: Powder Snow
moves.effect_text: Powder Snow Freezes all Legal Targets on 19+. *Grants: Freezer

moves.name: Power Shift
moves.effect_text: The user’s Attack stat and Defense stat are switched and the user’s Special Attack stat and Special Defense stat are switched. These changes last for the remainder of the scene, or until the user is switched out or Fainted.

moves.name: Power Split
moves.effect_text: The target has their Attack and Special Attack lowered by 5. If they do, the user gains a +5 bonus to Damage Rolls. These effects last until the end of the scene.

moves.name: Power Swap
moves.effect_text: The user and the target trade Combat Stage values for the Attack Stat, and then for the Special Attack Stat.

moves.name: Power Trick
moves.effect_text: The user's Attack stat and Defense stat are switched for the remainder of the encounter, or until the user is switched out or Fainted.

moves.name: Power Trip
moves.effect_text: This Move gains +2 to its Damage Base for every positive Combat Stage held by the user, to a maximum of DB20.

moves.name: Power Whip
moves.effect_text: *Grants: Threaded

moves.name: Power-Up Punch
moves.effect_text: If Power-Up Punch successfully hits a target, the user's Attack is raised by +1 Combat Stage

moves.name: Present
moves.effect_text: Roll 1d6; Present has a DB equal to twice the result. On a result of 1, instead of taking damage the target gains 20 HP.

moves.name: Protect
moves.effect_text: If the user is hit by a Move, the user may use Protect. The user is instead not hit by the Move. The user does not take any damage nor is affected by any of the Move's effects.

moves.name: Psybeam
moves.effect_text: Psybeam Confuses the target on 19+.

moves.name: Psych Up
moves.effect_text: The user's Combat Stages are changed to match the target's Combat Stages. Psych Up cannot miss.

moves.name: Psychic
moves.effect_text: The target is Pushed 1 meter in any direction. Psychic lowers the target’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage on 17+. Grants Telekinetic.

moves.name: Psychic Fangs
moves.effect_text: Light Screen, Reflect and Aurora Veil cannot be declared in response to Psychic Fangs.

moves.name: Psychic Terrain
moves.effect_text: The Field becomes Weird for five rounds. While the Field is Weird, non-Flying and non- Levitating Pokemon cannot declare Priority or Interrupt Moves outside their own Initiatives. Damaging Psychic-Type attacks deal an additional 10 damage.

moves.name: Psycho Boost
moves.effect_text: Lower the user's Special Attack by -2 Combat Stages after damage is resolved.

moves.name: Psycho Cut
moves.effect_text: Psycho Cut is a Critical Hit on 18+.

moves.name: Psycho Shift
moves.effect_text: The user is cured of a Status ailment and the target is given that Status ailment. Psycho Shift cannot miss. Psycho Shift can only be used if the user has a Status ailment and the target does not have the status ailment that is being transferred.

moves.name: Psyshield Bash
moves.effect_text: The user gains +5 DR for one full round.

moves.name: Psyshock
moves.effect_text: When calculating damage, the target subtracts their Defense from Psyshock's damage instead of their Special Defense. Psyshock is still otherwise Special (Special Evasion is used to avoid it, Mirror Coat can reflect it, etc.)

moves.name: Psystrike
moves.effect_text: When calculating damage, the target subtracts their Defense from Psystrike's damage instead of their Special Defense. Psystrike is still otherwise Special (Special Evasion is used to avoid it, Mirror Coat can reflect it, etc.)

moves.name: Psywave
moves.effect_text: Roll 1d4; on 1 the target loses HP equal to half the user's Level; on 2 the target loses HP equal to the user's Level; on 3 the target loses HP equal to 1.5x the user's level; on 4 the target loses HP equal to the user's Level doubled. Do not apply weakness or resistance, and do not apply Stats. Do apply Immunity.

moves.name: Punishment
moves.effect_text: Punishment's Damage Base is raised by +1 for each Combat Stage the target has, to a maximum of DB 12.

moves.name: Purify
moves.effect_text: The target is cured of all Permanent and Volatile Statuses. For every status removed, the user recovers a Tick of Hit Points.

moves.name: Pursuit
moves.effect_text: If the foe is fleeing or being switched out, Pursuit may be used as an Interrupt, targeting the triggering foe. When used as an Interrupt, Pursuit grants the user a +5 bonus to all Movement Speeds, and has a Damage Base of 8 (2d8+10/19).

moves.name: Push
moves.effect_text: You and the target each make opposed Combat or Athletics Checks. If you win, the target is Pushed back 1 Meter directly away from you. If you have Movement remaining this round, you may then Move into the newly occupied Space, and Push the target again. This continues until you choose to stop, or have no Movement remaining for the round. Push may only be used against a target whose weight is no heavier than your Heavy Lifting rating.

moves.name: Pyro Ball
moves.effect_text: The target is Burned on 19+.

moves.name: Quash
moves.effect_text: Change the target's Initiative to 0 for the remainder of the round.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.effect_text: None.

moves.name: Quick Guard
moves.effect_text: If the user or an adjacent ally is targeted by a Priority or Interrupt Attack, Quick Guard may be declared as an Interrupt, causing the triggering attack to have no effect.

moves.name: Quiver Dance
moves.effect_text: Raise the user's Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by +1 CS each.

moves.name: Rage
moves.effect_text: The user becomes Enraged. Until the end of the user’s next turn, if the user is Enraged, the user gains +1 Attack Combat Stage whenever they are damaged by an Damaging Move or Attack.

moves.name: Rage Powder
moves.effect_text: All legal targets hit by Rage Powder are Enraged. While enraged, they must shift to target the user when using a Move or Attack if the user is within reach. If the user is Fainted or Switched out, all legal targets hit by Rage Powder are no longer Enraged.

moves.name: Raging Fury
moves.effect_text: The user becomes Enraged. Legal targets become Enraged on a 16+.

moves.name: Rain Dance
moves.effect_text: The weather becomes Rainy for 5 rounds. While Rainy, Water-Type Attacks gain a +5 bonus to Damage Rolls, and Fire-Type Attacks suffer a -5 Damage penalty.

moves.name: Rapid Spin
moves.effect_text: Rapid Spin destroys all Hazards within 5 meters, removes Leech Seeds, and removes the user's Trapped or Stuck status.

moves.name: Rapid Spin [SS]
moves.effect_text: Rapid Spin destroys all Hazards within 5 meters, removes Leech Seeds, and removes the user’s Trapped or Stuck status. If Rapid Spin hits, the user’s speed raises 1 CS.

moves.name: Razor Leaf
moves.effect_text: Razor Leaf is a Critical Hit on 18+.

moves.name: Razor Shell
moves.effect_text: Razor Shell lowers the target's Defense by -1 CS on an Even-Numbered Roll.

moves.name: Razor Wind
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: The user may not shift this round. The user whips up a whirlwind around themselves, granting +2 Evasion until the end of their next turn and destroying any Smokescreen or Hazards on any squares it is standing on and in all squares adjacent to it. Resolution Effect: The user attacks with Razor Wind. Razor Wind is a Critical Hit on 18+.

moves.name: Recover
moves.effect_text: The user regains HP equal to half of its full HP.

moves.name: Recycle
moves.effect_text: The effect of a consumable item used earlier in the encounter is used again as if it had not been destroyed. The item is still gone.

moves.name: Reflect
moves.effect_text: Blessing – Any user affected by Reflect may activate it when receiving Physical Damage to resist the Damage one step. Reflect may be activated 2 times, and then disappears.

moves.name: Reflect Type
moves.effect_text: Reflect Type changes one of the user’s Types into one Type of your choice that the target has for the rest of the scene.

moves.name: Refresh
moves.effect_text: The user is cured of all Poison, Burns, and Paralysis.

moves.name: Relic Song
moves.effect_text: All legal targets fall Asleep on 16+. As long as Meloetta knows Relic Song, it may change between Aria Form and Step Form as a Swift Action when using Relic Song or as a Standard Action otherwise. Both Aria and Step Form must be statted with the same HP Stat.

moves.name: Rending Spell
moves.effect_text: The target loses a Tick of Hit Points on 16+.

moves.name: Resonance Beam
moves.effect_text: All targets have their Special Defense lowered by 1 Combat Stage on 20+. This Effect Range is extended by +1 for each foe targeted by this Move.

moves.name: Rest
moves.effect_text: The user is set to their full Hit Point value. The user is cured of any Status ailments. Then, the user falls Asleep. The user cannot make Sleep Checks at the beginning of their turn. They are cured of the Sleep at the end of their turn in 2 rounds.

moves.name: Retaliate
moves.effect_text: Retaliate's DB is doubled to DB 14 (4d10+15 / 40) if an ally has been Fainted by a Damaging Move used by the Target in the last 2 rounds of Combat.

moves.name: Return
moves.effect_text: Return's DB is equal to 3 plus the user's Loyalty Value.

moves.name: Revelation Dance
moves.effect_text: Revelation Dance is the same Type as the user’s primary Type (aka the first one in its Pokedex listing). Revelation Dance deals +5 Bonus Damage for every other Dance Move used by the user this round, to a maximum of +15.

moves.name: Revenge
moves.effect_text: When declaring Revenge, the user does nothing and may not Shift. At the end of the round, the user may Shift and use Revenge. If the target damaged the user this round, Revenge has a Damage Base of 12 (4d10+15 / 40).

moves.name: Reversal
moves.effect_text: For each Injury the user has, Reversal's Damage Base is increased by +1.

moves.name: Riposte
moves.effect_text: Trigger: Your Target misses you with a melee Attack. Limitations: Melee or Short-Ranged Weapons Only

moves.name: Rising Voltage
moves.effect_text: After Rising Voltage is resolved, you may create Electric Terrain in a Blast 7, centered on the user, that lasts for 5 turns. Any creatures in those spaces are affected as if by the Field Move Electric Terrain, rather than any other Field Move. This Effect may trigger only once per Scene.

moves.name: Roar
moves.effect_text: When declaring Roar, the user does nothing. At the end of the round, the user Shifts and uses Roar. Targets hit by Roar immediately Shift away from the user using their highest useable movement capability, towards their Trainer if possible. If the target is an owned Pokémon and ends this shift within 6 meters of their Poké Ball, they are immediately recalled to their Poké Ball. If that Trainer sends out a replacement, they do not lose their Command action.

moves.name: Roar of Time
moves.effect_text: Roar of Time Slows all legal targets, even if the attack misses.

moves.name: Rock Blast
moves.effect_text: *Grants Materializer

moves.name: Rock Climb
moves.effect_text: Rock Climb Confuses the target on 17+.

moves.name: Rock Polish
moves.effect_text: Raise the user's Speed by +2 CS.

moves.name: Rock Slide
moves.effect_text: Rock Slide Flinches all legal targets on 17+.

moves.name: Rock Smash
moves.effect_text: Rock Smash lowers the target’s Defense 1 Combat Stage on 17+.

moves.name: Rock Tomb
moves.effect_text: Rock Tomb lowers the target's Speed by -1 CS. *Grants Materializer

moves.name: Rock Wrecker
moves.effect_text: *Grants Materializer

moves.name: Role Play
moves.effect_text: The user gains one of the target's Abilities, chosen at random, for the remainder of the encounter. This effect ends if the user Faints or is switched out. Role Play cannot miss.

moves.name: Rolling Kick
moves.effect_text: Rolling Kick Flinches the target on 15+.

moves.name: Rollout
moves.effect_text: The user continues to use Rollout on each of its turns until they miss any target with Rollout, or are not able to hit any target with Rollout during their turn. Each successive use of Rollout increases Rollout’s Damage Base by +4 to a maximum of DB 15.

moves.name: Roost
moves.effect_text: The user regains HP equal to half of its full HP. If the user is a Flying Type, it loses the Flying Type until the start of their next turn.

moves.name: Rototiller
moves.effect_text: All Grass-type Pokémon in the area raise their Attack and Special Attack 1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Round
moves.effect_text: Round's Damage Base is equal to 6, plus +2 more for each use of Round by any Trainer or Pokémon this round, up to a maximum of DB 12 (3d12+10 / 30).

moves.name: Sacred Fire
moves.effect_text: Sacred Fire Burns the target on Even-Numbered Rolls.

moves.name: Sacred Sword
moves.effect_text: Sacred Sword cannot miss.

moves.name: Safeguard
moves.effect_text: Blessing – Any user affected by Safeguard may activate it when receiving a Status Affliction to ignore the effects of that Status Affliction on their next turn. Safeguard may be activated 3 times, and then disappears.

moves.name: Salvo
moves.effect_text: Limitation: Ranged Weapons Only

moves.name: Sand Attack
moves.effect_text: The target is Blinded until the end of their next turn.

moves.name: Sand Tomb
moves.effect_text: The target is put in a Vortex.

moves.name: Sandstorm
moves.effect_text: The weather changes to a Sandstorm for 5 rounds. While it is Sandstorming, all non-Ground, Rock, or Steel Type Pokémon lose a Tick of Hit Points at the beginning of their turn.

moves.name: Sandstorm Sear
moves.effect_text: The target is Burned on a 15+

moves.name: Scald
moves.effect_text: Scald Burns the target on 15+.

moves.name: Scale Shot
moves.effect_text: The user’s Speed is raised 1 CS, and the user’s Defense is lowered 1 CS.

moves.name: Scary Face
moves.effect_text: Lower the target’s Speed by -2 CS.

moves.name: Scorching Sands
moves.effect_text: Scorching Sands Burns the target on 15+.

moves.name: Screech
moves.effect_text: Lower the Defense of all legal targets by -2 CS.

moves.name: Searing Shot
moves.effect_text: Searing Shot Burns all targets on 15+.

moves.name: Secret Force
moves.effect_text: When calculating damage, the target subtracts their Defense from Secret Force’s damage instead of their Special Defense. Secret Force is still otherwise Special. Limitation: Melee Weapons Only

moves.name: Secret Power
moves.effect_text: Secret Power's effect depends on Environ. Secret Power's effect activates on 17+.

moves.name: Secret Sword
moves.effect_text: When calculating damage, the target subtracts their Defense from Secret Sword's damage instead of their Special Defense. Psyshock is still otherwise Special (Special Evasion is used to avoid it, Mirror Coat can reflect it, etc.)

moves.name: Seed Flare
moves.effect_text: All Legal Targets have their Special Defense lowered 1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Seismic Toss
moves.effect_text: The target loses HP equal to the level of Seismic Toss's user. Do not apply weakness or resistance. Do not apply stats.

moves.name: Self-Destruct
moves.effect_text: The user's HP is set to -50% of its full HP. This HP loss may not be prevented or reduced in any way. The user's loyalty may be lowered.

moves.name: Shadow Ball
moves.effect_text: Shadow Ball lowers the target's Special Defense by -1 CS on 17+.

moves.name: Shadow Bone
moves.effect_text: Lower the target's Defense by -1 CS on a 17+. Counts as a Bone Move for Cubone/Marowak’s Abilities, etc.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.effect_text: Shadow Claw is a Critical Hit on 18+.

moves.name: Shadow Force
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: The user is removed from the field, and their turn ends. Resolution Effect: Shadow Force’s user appears adjacent to any legal target on the field, ignoring Movement Capabilities, and then uses Shadow Force’s attack. Shadow Force cannot be avoided by Moves with the Shield Keyword, the Dodge Ability, or similar effects, and Intercepts may not be attempted in response.

moves.name: Shadow Punch
moves.effect_text: Shadow Punch cannot miss.

moves.name: Shadow Sneak
moves.effect_text: None.

moves.name: Sharpen
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Attack by +1 CS.

moves.name: Sheer Cold
moves.effect_text: Roll 1d100. This roll may not be modified in any way. If you roll X or lower, the target Faints. X is equal to 30 + The User's Level - The Target's Level. *Grants: Freezer

moves.name: Shell Side Arm
moves.effect_text: This attack uses the highest of the user’s Attack or Special Attack Stat, though this does not change the Class of the Move. In addition, if the target’s Defense is lower than its Special Defense, this attack targets Defense, becoming a Physical Move. The target is poisoned on a 17+.

moves.name: Shell Smash
moves.effect_text: Raise the user's Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by +2 CS each. Lower the user's Defense and Special Defense by -1 CS each.

moves.name: Shell Trap
moves.effect_text: If the user is hit by a Melee attack, they may use Shell Trap as an Interrupt.

moves.name: Shelter
moves.effect_text: The user gains +1 CS in Defense and Special Defense, and +2 Evasion.

moves.name: Shift Gear
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Attack by +1 CS and Speed by +2 CS.

moves.name: Shock Wave
moves.effect_text: Shock Wave cannot miss. *Grants Zapper

moves.name: Shore Up
moves.effect_text: The user regains Hit Points equal to half of its full Hit Point value. If it is Sand Storming, the user gains 2/3 of its full Hit Point value. If it is Sunny, Rainy, or Hailing, the user gains 1/4 of its full Hit Point value.

moves.name: Signal Beam
moves.effect_text: Signal Beam Confuses the target on 19+.

moves.name: Silver Wind
moves.effect_text: Silver Wind raises each of the user's stats by +1 CS on 19+.

moves.name: Simple Beam
moves.effect_text: You choose one of the target's Abilities. Simple Beam changes that Ability to Simple for the remainder of the encounter.

moves.name: Sing
moves.effect_text: All legal Targets fall Asleep. On a miss, Sing instead causes targets to become Slowed and suffer a -2 penalty to their Evasion until the end of the user's next turn.

moves.name: Sketch
moves.effect_text: Sketch cannot miss. Once Sketch has been used, remove Sketch from the user's Move list. The last Move that the target used is added to the user's Move list permanently. Sketch may not be Interrupted or Intercepted.

moves.name: Skill Swap
moves.effect_text: The user loses one of their Abilities, selected by the user, and gains one the target’s Abilities, selected at random, for the remainder of encounter. The target loses the copied Ability, and gains the user’s lost Ability. This effect ends if either the target or the user is Switched out or Fainted, but only for that Pokémon or Trainer.

moves.name: Skitter Smack
moves.effect_text: The user Shifts up to its Overland Capability, ignoring Attacks of Opportunity, before attacking with Skitter Smack. On a hit, the target’s Special Attack is lowered 1 CS.

moves.name: Skull Bash
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: Raise the user's Defense by +1 CS. Resolution Effect: The user may attack with Skull Bash. The target is pushed 3 meters.

moves.name: Sky Attack
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: The user is moved up 25 meters into the air. Resolution Effect: The user may shift until they are next to a legal target in the encounter. They may then shift again and pass through legal targets to attack with Sky Attack. Sky Attack Flinches a target on 17+.

moves.name: Sky Drop
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: Make Sky Drop's Accuracy Check. If the user hits, the user and target are moved 25 meters into the air. The target forfeits their next turn and cannot Shift or take actions until Sky Drop is resolved. Resolution Effect: Shift while in the air and lower both the user and the target heights back to the ground. Then apply Sky Drop's damage. If the target has a Sky or Levitate Speed, Sky Drop fails to deal damage. If the user is Fainted after the Set-Up but before the Resolution, the target falls to the ground and takes damage as if Sky Drop had a Damage Base of 3 (1d6+5/8) unless they have a Sky or Levitate Speed, in which case they take no damage.

moves.name: Sky Uppercut
moves.effect_text: Sky Uppercut may be used as an Interrupt when against a target initiating Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop. If Sky Uppercut successfully hits its target, the Triggering Move fails (though the target may take their next turn normally.)

moves.name: Slack Off
moves.effect_text: The user regains HP equal to half of its full HP.

moves.name: Slam
moves.effect_text: Slam may be used as a Free Action at the end of a Sprint Maneuver taken as a Standard Action, as long as the user Shifted at least 3 meters in a straight line towards the target. When used this way, Slam gains the Smite keyword.

moves.name: Slash
moves.effect_text: Slash is a Critical Hit on 18+.

moves.name: Sleep Powder
moves.effect_text: The target falls Asleep.

moves.name: Sleep Talk
moves.effect_text: Select another of the user’s Moves at random; this turn, the user may Shift and use that Move despite being Asleep. Sleep Talk can be only be used by Sleeping targets.

moves.name: Slice
moves.effect_text: Limitation: Melee Weapons Only

moves.name: Sludge
moves.effect_text: Sludge Poisons the target on 15+.

moves.name: Sludge Bomb
moves.effect_text: Sludge Bomb Poisons the target on 15+.

moves.name: Sludge Wave
moves.effect_text: Sludge Wave Poisons all legal targets on 19+.

moves.name: Smack Down
moves.effect_text: The target is knocked down to ground level, and loses all Sky or Levitate Speeds for 3 turns. During this time, they may be hit by Ground-Type Moves even if normally immune.

moves.name: Smart Strike
moves.effect_text: Smart Strike cannot miss.

moves.name: Smelling Salts
moves.effect_text: If the target is Paralyzed, Smelling Salt’s Damage Base is doubled to 14 (4d10+15 / 40), and cures the target of Paralysis.

moves.name: Smog
moves.effect_text: Smog Poisons all legal targets on an Even-Numbered Roll.

moves.name: Smokescreen
moves.effect_text: Smokescreen creates a blast of Smoke that covers the target area; the Smoke persists until the end of the encounter, or until Defog or Whirlwind are used. All targets attacking from or into the Smoke receive a -3 penalty to Accuracy.

moves.name: Snap Trap
moves.effect_text: The target is trapped in a Vortex. The DC to escape the Vortex is increased by 3.

moves.name: Snarl
moves.effect_text: Lower the Special Attack of all legal targets by -1 CS.

moves.name: Snatch
moves.effect_text: If the target uses a Self-Targeting Move, you may use Snatch as an Interrupt. You gain the benefits of the Self-Targeting Move instead of the target.

moves.name: Snipe Shot
moves.effect_text: Snipe Shot is a Critical Hit on 18+. This Move may not be Intercepted, nor may any Abilities, Moves, or Features be activated to change this Move’s target. Any of those existing effects (such as Follow Me) fail.

moves.name: Snore
moves.effect_text: Snore Flinches all legal targets on 15+. Snore may only be used by Sleeping users.

moves.name: Soak
moves.effect_text: The target gains the Water type in addition to its other Types for 5 turns.

moves.name: Soft-Boiled
moves.effect_text: The target regains Hit Points equal to half of its full Hit Points. The user may target themselves with Soft-Boiled.

moves.name: Solar Beam
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: If the weather is not Sunny, the user’s turn ends. If the weather is Sunny, immediately proceed to the Resolution Effect instead and this Move loses the Set-Up keyword. Resolution Effect: The user attacks with Solar Beam. If the weather is Rainy, Sandstorming, or Hailing, Solar Beam’s Damage Base is lowered to 6 (2d6+8 / 15).

moves.name: Solar Blade
moves.effect_text: Set-Up Effect: If the weather is not Sunny, the user’s gains +1 Attack CS and +1 Special Defense CS. If it is Sunny, immediately Resolve. Resolution Effect: Attack with Solar Blade. Half damage in Sandstorm, Hail, or Rain.

moves.name: Sonic Boom
moves.effect_text: Sonicboom causes the target to lose 15 HP. Sonicboom is Special and interacts with other moves and effects as such (Special Evasion may be applied to avoid it, Mirror Coat can reflect it, etc.)

moves.name: Spacial Rend
moves.effect_text: Spacial Rend is a Critical Hit on Even-Numbered Rolls.

moves.name: Spark
moves.effect_text: Spark Paralyzes the target on 15+.

moves.name: Sparkling Aria
moves.effect_text: When you hit a target with Sparkling Aria, the user may choose to deal no damage and instead cures that target of Burn, Confusion, Infatuation, Rage, or Provocation.

moves.name: Spectral Thief
moves.effect_text: Before rolling damage, transfer all Combat Stages on the target to the user.

moves.name: Speed Swap
moves.effect_text: The user and the target trade Initiative values.

moves.name: Spider Web
moves.effect_text: Spider Web cannot miss. The target is Stuck and Trapped. If the target is freed of the Stuck condition, it is freed of Trapped as well. *Grants Threaded

moves.name: Spikes
moves.effect_text: Set 8 square meters of Spikes within the range such that all 8 meters are adjacent with at least one other space of Spikes. Spikes cause terrain to count as Slow Terrain, and a grounded foe that runs into the hazards will lose 1/10th of their full HP and become Slowed until the end of their next turn.

moves.name: Spiky Shield
moves.effect_text: If the user is hit by an attack, the user may use Spiky Shield. The user is instead not hit by the Move. You do not take any damage nor are you affected by any of the Move’s effects. In addition, if the triggering attack was Melee-ranged, the attacker loses Hit Points equal to 1/10th of their Max Hit Points.

moves.name: Spirit Break
moves.effect_text: The target’s Special Attack stat is lowered 1 CS.

moves.name: Spirit Lance
moves.effect_text: Spirit Lance deals +3 damage to all targets for each target beyond the first that it successfully hits.

moves.name: Spirit Shackle
moves.effect_text: The Target is Trapped for 2 rounds.

moves.name: Spit Up
moves.effect_text: For each Stockpiled Count the user has, Spit Up’s Damage Base is increased by +8. If the user has no Stockpiled count, Spit Up cannot be used.

moves.name: Spite
moves.effect_text: Spite may be used as a Free Action that does not take up a Command whenever the user is hit by a Move. That Move becomes Disabled for the attacker.

moves.name: Splash
moves.effect_text: Shift Action - The user may make a single Jump, adding +1 to their Long Jump and High Jump values, and gains +2 Evasion until the end of their next turn. *Grants +1 Long Jump

moves.name: Spore
moves.effect_text: The target falls Asleep.

moves.name: Spotlight
moves.effect_text: Until the end of the user’s next turn, the target is Blinded and Vulnerable.

moves.name: Springtide Storm
moves.effect_text: If the user is not in Therian Forme, the user has each of its stats raised by +1 CS on a 16+. If the user is in Therian Form, the target has each of its stats lowered by -1 CS on a 16+.

moves.name: Sprint
moves.effect_text: Increase your Movement Speeds by 50% for the rest of your turn.

moves.name: Stealth Rock
moves.effect_text: Set 4 square meters of Stealth Rock hazards within 6 meters. If a foe moves within 2 meters of a space occupied by Rocks, move at most one Rock to the offender, then destroy the Rock. When that happens, the Stealth Rock causes a foe to lose a Tick of Hit Points. Stealth Rock is considered to be dealing damage; Apply Weakness and Resistance. Do not apply stats. A Pokémon who has been hit by a Stealth Rock Hazard cannot get hit by another in the same encounter until it is returned to a Poké Ball and then sent back out. *Grants Materializer

moves.name: Steam Eruption
moves.effect_text: Steam Eruption Burns all legal targets on a 15+.

moves.name: Steamroller
moves.effect_text: Steamroller Flinches the target on 15+. If the target is Small, Steamroller deals an additional +5 Damage.

moves.name: Steel Beam
moves.effect_text: The user’s Hit Points are reduced by 50% of their full Hit Point value. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented or reduced in any way.

moves.name: Steel Roller
moves.effect_text: Legal targets hit by Steel Roller are Tripped on a roll of 15+. Any Hazards in spaces Passed through or adjacent to those spaces are removed (they are removed before they can affect the user). If the user moves through an area of Terrain, or a Field-range Terrain is active, those effects immediately end.

moves.name: Steel Wing
moves.effect_text: Steel Wing raises the user's Defense by +1 CS on 15+.

moves.name: Sticky Web
moves.effect_text: Set 8 square meters of Sticky Web hazards within your range such that all 8 meters are adjacent with at least one other space of Sticky Web. Sticky Web causes Terrain to become Slow Terrain, and a grounded foe that runs into the hazard has its Speed lowered by -1 CS and becomes Slowed until the end of their next turn. Flying-type Pokemon and Pokemon and Trainers with Levitate are not affected by Sticky Web. Bug-type Pokemon may move over Sticky Web harmlessly, destroying theHazards as they do so. *Grants Threaded

moves.name: Stockpile
moves.effect_text: The user adds 1 to their Stockpiled count to a maximum of 3. For each number a Stockpiled count is above 0, raise the user’s Defense and Special Defense by +1 CS each. If a Stockpiled count is set to 0, any Combat Stages gained from the Stockpiled count are removed.

moves.name: Stomp
moves.effect_text: Stomp Flinches the target on 15+. If the target is at least one size category smaller than the user, Stomp deals an additional 10 damage.

moves.name: Stomping Tantrum
moves.effect_text: If the user’s last attack failed or missed, Stomping Tantrum is DB15 instead.

moves.name: Stone Axe
moves.effect_text: Stone Axe is a critical hit on an 18+. Once per scene, on a hit, the target may be put in a Vortex.

moves.name: Stone Edge
moves.effect_text: Stone Edge is a Critical Hit on 17+.

moves.name: Stored Power
moves.effect_text: For every Combat Stage the user has above 0, add +2 to Stored Power’s Damage Base, up to a maximum of Damage Base 20.

moves.name: Storm Throw
moves.effect_text: If Storm Throw hits, it is a Critical Hit.

moves.name: Strange Steam
moves.effect_text: The target is confused on 17+.

moves.name: Strength
moves.effect_text: You may immediately initiate a Push Maneuver as a Free Action. The Maneuver automatically hits, but you must still make the Opposed Roll. *Grants +1 Power

moves.name: Strength Sap
moves.effect_text: The user gains Hit Points equal to the higher of the target's Attack or Special Attack; the target then loses -1 CS in that Stat.

moves.name: String Shot
moves.effect_text: Lower the Speed of all legal targets by -1 CS. If this lowers their Speed CS to -6, or if their Speed CS was already at -6, they are instead Stuck. *Grants Threaded

moves.name: Struggle Bug
moves.effect_text: Lower the Special Attack of all legal targets by -1 CS.

moves.name: Stuff Cheeks
moves.effect_text: The user immediately consumes one of its Food Buffs, regardless of any conditions that need to be met, gaining its benefit if applicable. If a Buff is consumed, the user’s Defense CS is raised by 2.

moves.name: Stun Spore
moves.effect_text: The target is Paralyzed.

moves.name: Submission
moves.effect_text: On an accuracy roll of 15+, the target is Tripped.

moves.name: Substitute
moves.effect_text: The user loses 1/4 of their maximum Hit Points. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented in any way. The user creates an Illusory Substitute Coat, which has Hit Points equal to 1/4th of the user’s full Hit Points +1. If the user would be hit by a Move or attack, instead the Substitute gets hit. Apply weakness, resistance and stats to the Substitute. The Substitute is immune to Status Afflictions and Status Moves. Moves with the Social or Sonic keywords completely ignore and bypass the Substitute. Once the Substitute has been destroyed, the user may be hit as normal. Substitute cannot be used if the user has less than 1/4 of their full Hit Points.

moves.name: Sucker Punch
moves.effect_text: If an adjacent foe targets the user with a Damaging Attack, Sucker Punch may be used as an Interrupt Move against the triggering foe.

moves.name: Sucker Punch [SM]
moves.effect_text: If an adjacent foe targets the user with a Damaging Attack, Sucker Punch may be used as an Interrupt Move against the triggering foe.

moves.name: Sunny Day
moves.effect_text: The weather becomes Sunny for 5 rounds. While Sunny, Fire-Type Attacks gain a +5 bonus to Damage Rolls, and Water-Type Attacks suffer a -5 Damage penalty.

moves.name: Sunsteel Strike
moves.effect_text: This Move ignores any Abilities that would cause it to fail or miss; those Abilities cannot be activated in response to Sunsteel Strike (ex: Dodge, Wonder Guard)

moves.name: Super Fang
moves.effect_text: The target loses 1/2 of its current HP.

moves.name: Superpower
moves.effect_text: Superpower lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1 Combat Stage each.

moves.name: Supersonic
moves.effect_text: The target becomes Confused. On miss, the target suffers a -2 penalty to Accuracy Rolls for one full round.

moves.name: Surf
moves.effect_text: As a Shift Action, the user may Move to any open square in Surf ’s area of effect without provoking any Attacks of Opportunity.

moves.name: Surging Strikes
moves.effect_text: If Surging Strikes hits, it is a Critical Hit. After attacking with Surging Strikes, hit or miss, the user may Shift 2m, ignoring Attacks of Opportunity from their target. It may then make an additional attack with this Move on a different target. This effect may be repeated a second time, the third attack targeting a creature that has not yet been targeted by either prior attack. Before making each attack roll, the user can elect to give up triggering all remaining additional shifts and attacks. Surging Strikes gains +3 DB for each attack that is given up.

moves.name: Swagger
moves.effect_text: Raise the target's Attack by +2 CS. The target is Confused.

moves.name: Swagger [SM]
moves.effect_text: Raise the target's Attack by +2 CS. The target is Confused.

moves.name: Swallow
moves.effect_text: If the user’s Stockpiled count is 1, they are healed 25% of their full Hit Point value; if their Stockpiled count is 2, they are healed half of their full Hit Point value; if their Stockpiled count is 3, they are healed back to full Hit Points. After using Swallow, the user’s Stockpiled count is set to 0. If the user has no Stockpiled count, Swallow does nothing.

moves.name: Sweeping Strike
moves.effect_text: You may attempt a Trip Maneuver against the target as a free action. Limitation: Short-Range Weapons or Weapons with the Reach Quality Only

moves.name: Sweet Kiss
moves.effect_text: The target is Confused. On miss, the target suffers a -2 penalty to Accuracy Rolls for one full round.

moves.name: Sweet Scent
moves.effect_text: Targets hit by Sweet Scent gain a -2 Penalty to Evasion. (Total Evasion may not be lowered to a negative value.) *Grants Alluring

moves.name: Swift
moves.effect_text: Swift cannot Miss.

moves.name: Switcheroo
moves.effect_text: The user and the target exchange held items.

moves.name: Swords Dance
moves.effect_text: Raise the user's Attack by +2 CS.

moves.name: Synchronoise
moves.effect_text: Synchronoise can only hit targets that share a type with Synchronoise's user.

moves.name: Synthesis
moves.effect_text: The user regains Hit Points equal to half of its full Hit Point value. If it is Sunny, the user gains 2/3 of its full Hit Point value. If it is Rainy, Sand Storming, or Hailing, the user gains 1/4 of its full Hit Point value.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.effect_text: The target is Pushed 2 Meters.

moves.name: Tackle [SM]
moves.effect_text: The target is Pushed 2 Meters.

moves.name: Tail Glow
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Special Attack by +3 CS. *Grants Glow

moves.name: Tail Whip
moves.effect_text: All legal targets have their Defense lowered by -1 CS.

moves.name: Tailwind
moves.effect_text: For the remainder of the encounter, all allied trainers and Pokémon gain +5 to their Initiative. Multiple instances of Tailwind cannot stack. *Grants: Guster

moves.name: Take Aim
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Accuracy by +1. If the user performs an Weapon Move on their next turn that deals damage, add its Damage Dice Roll an extra time to the damage.

moves.name: Take Down
moves.effect_text: You may perform a Trip Maneuver against the target as a Free Action.

moves.name: Take Heart
moves.effect_text: The user gains +1 CS in all its stats and cures all of its Status conditions.

moves.name: Tar Shot
moves.effect_text: The target gains a Coat that is automatically expended upon being hit with a Fire Type attack in order to make them one step more vulnerable to that attack. In addition, the target’s Speed is lowered by 1 CS.

moves.name: Taunt
moves.effect_text: The target becomes Enraged.

moves.name: Tearful Look
moves.effect_text: All legal targets lose -1 Attack and Special Attack CS each.

moves.name: Teatime
moves.effect_text: All participants in the battle may choose to immediately consume one of their Food Buffs, regardless of if the conditions to do so are met.

moves.name: Techno Blast
moves.effect_text: Techno Blast’s Type can be any Type while holding the appropriate Drive item or Plate item.

moves.name: Teeter Dance
moves.effect_text: All legal targets are Confused.

moves.name: Telekinesis
moves.effect_text: The target becomes Lifted. While Lifted, they gain the Levitate Ability, are Slowed, and lose all Movement Capabilities except for the Levitate 4 granted by Levitate (reduced to 2 by the Slow condition). While Lifted, the user may not apply any Evasion bonuses to determine whether they are hit by Moves or not. The Lifted target may use a Shift Action to roll 1d20; on a result of 16+, they stop being Lifted. *Grants Telekinetic

moves.name: Teleport
moves.effect_text: The user Teleports up to X meters, where X is its Teleporter Capability. Any Move that targeted Teleport's user continue through the desired target's space if the Move allows for it as if the user hadn't been there; single target moves simply miss. *Grants Teleporter 4

moves.name: Terrain Pulse
moves.effect_text: If the user is under the effects of a Terrain, Terrain Pulse has a Damage Base of 10 (3d8+10 / 24). In addition, Terrain Pulse becomes the Type that corresponds with the Move that creates that Terrain. (For example, if in Misty Terrain, it would become Fairy Type.) If the user is under the effects of multiple Terrains, choose one to affect this Move.

moves.name: Terrorize
moves.effect_text: Make an Intimidate Check, opposed by the target’s Intimidate or Focus. If you win, the target loses all Temporary Hit Points and can only use At-Will Frequency Moves for one full round.

moves.name: Thief
moves.effect_text: Thief takes the target's held item and attaches it to Thief's user if the user is not holding anything.

moves.name: Thousand Arrows
moves.effect_text: When calculating Weakness and Resistance for Thousand Arrows, Flying-Typed targets calculate damage as if Ground was neutral to Ice. Thousand Arrows ignores the Levitate Ability, The target is knocked down to ground level, and loses all Sky or Levitate Speeds for 3 turns. During this time, they may be hit by Ground-Type Moves even if normally immune.

moves.name: Thousand Waves
moves.effect_text: Legal Targets are Trapped for 2 Turns.

moves.name: Thrash
moves.effect_text: After damage is dealt, the user becomes Enraged and Confused.

moves.name: Throat Chop
moves.effect_text: The target cannot use Moves with the Sonic keyword for the next two turns.

moves.name: Thunder
moves.effect_text: Thunder Paralyzes the target on 15+. If the target is in Sunny Weather, Thunder's Accuracy Check is 11. If the target is in Rainy Weather, Thunder cannot miss. If the target is airborne as a result of Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, Thunder cannot miss.

moves.name: Thunder Cage
moves.effect_text: The targets are trapped in a Vortex. The DC to escape the Vortex is increased by 3.

moves.name: Thunder Fang
moves.effect_text: Thunder Fang Paralyzes or Flinches on 18-19; flip a coin to determine whether the foe becomes Paralyzed or Flinched. On 20, the foe is both Paralyzed and Flinched.

moves.name: Thunder Punch
moves.effect_text: Thunder Punch Paralyzes the target on 19+.

moves.name: Thunder Shock
moves.effect_text: Thunder Shock Paralyzes the target on 17+. *Grants Zapper

moves.name: Thunder Wave
moves.effect_text: Thunder Wave cannot miss. Thunder Wave Paralyzes the target. Pokémon immune to Electric Attacks are immune to Thunder Wave's effects.

moves.name: Thunder Wave [SM]
moves.effect_text: Thunder Wave Paralyzes the target. Pokémon immune to Electric Attacks are immune to Thunder Wave's effects.

moves.name: Thunderbolt
moves.effect_text: Thunderbolt Paralyzes the target on 19+.

moves.name: Thunderous Kick
moves.effect_text: All legal targets hit lose 1 Defense Combat Stage. Once per Scene, Thunderous Kick may instead be used as an Electric-Type Move.

moves.name: Tickle
moves.effect_text: Lower the target’s Attack and Defense by -1 CS each.

moves.name: Titanic Slam
moves.effect_text: On Even-Numbered Rolls, the target is Slowed for one full round. Limitation: Melee Weapons Only

moves.name: Topsy-Turvy
moves.effect_text: The target’s Combat Stages are inverted; +1 Stage becomes -1 Stage, -3 Stages becomes +3 Stages, etc.

moves.name: Torment
moves.effect_text: The target becomes Suppressed.

moves.name: Toxic
moves.effect_text: The target is Badly Poisoned. If the user is Poison Type, Toxic cannot miss.

moves.name: Toxic Spikes
moves.effect_text: Set 8 square meters of Toxic Spikes within the range such that all 8 meters are adjacent with at least one other space of Toxic Spikes. Toxic Spikes cause Terrain to become Slow Terrain, and a grounded foe that runs into the hazard becomes Poisoned and Slowed until the end of their next turn. If there are 2 layers of Toxic Spikes on the same space, it Badly Poisons the foes instead. Poison-Type Pokemon may move over Toxic Spikes harmlessly, destroying the Hazards as they do so.

moves.name: Toxic Threads
moves.effect_text: The target is Poisoned and receives -1 Speed Combat Stage. If the target is already Poisoned, they instead lose a Tick of Hit Points and receive -2 Speed Combat Stages.

moves.name: Transform
moves.effect_text: The user targets a Pokémon within 10 meters and assumes the form of the target. It gains all of the target's Moves, Abilities, and Capabilities; and copies its weight and height. Transform lasts until the user is switched out, Fainted, or until the end of the encounter. The user may choose to end the Transformation on its turn as a free action, regaining its previous Move List. The user's Stats do not change from using Transform. Transform cannot miss.

moves.name: Tri Attack
moves.effect_text: Tri Attack gives the target a Status ailment on 17+. If this effect is triggered, roll 1d3; on 1 the target is Paralyzed; on 2 the target is Burned; on 3 the target is Frozen.

moves.name: Trick
moves.effect_text: Both targets must be hit for Trick to succeed. The user may target itself or willing allies with Trick; you do not need to roll for Accuracy Check in these cases. Both targets lose their Held Item and gain the other target's Held Item. If a target has no Held Item, they still can gain the other target's Held Item.

moves.name: Trick Room
moves.effect_text: Starting at the beginning of the next round, for 5 rounds, the area is considered Rewinding. While Rewinding, Initiative is reversed, and participants instead go from lowest Initiative to highest.

moves.name: Trick-or-Treat
moves.effect_text: The target gains the Ghost Type in addition to its other Types for 5 turns.

moves.name: Trip
moves.effect_text: You and the target each make opposed Combat or Acrobatics Checks. If you win, the target is knocked over and Tripped.

moves.name: Triple Arrows
moves.effect_text: Targets hit by Triple Arrows lose 1 CS in both Defense and Special Defense. After attacking with Triple Arrows, hit or miss, the user may Disengage 2m and attack a different target with Triple Arrows. This effect may be repeated a second time, targeting a creature that has not been targeted by either prior attack. Before making each attack roll, the user can elect to give up triggering allremaining additional shifts and attacks. Triple Arrowsgains +1 Accuracy and +1 DB for each attack that is given up. Triple Arrows always benefits from the Technician Ability. Once Daily, after all attacks with Triple Arrows have been resolved, the user becomes Pumped. While Pumped, the user’s Critical Range is extended by 2, or 18+ if the Critical Range is not otherwise extended. Being switched will cause this effect to end.

moves.name: Triple Axel
moves.effect_text: After attacking with Triple Axel, hit or miss, the user may Disengage 2m and attack a different target with Triple Axel. This effect may be repeated a second time, targeting a creature that has not been targeted by either prior attack. Before making each attack roll, the user can elect to give up triggering all remaining additional shifts and attacks. Triple Axel gains +1 Accuracy and +1 DB for each attack that is given up. Triple Axel always benefits from the Technician Ability.

moves.name: Triple Kick
moves.effect_text: Make three attacks with Triple Kick. If you hit once, Triple Kick has a DB of 1. If you hit two times, Triple Kick has a DB of 3. If you hit three times, Triple Kick has a DB of 6.

moves.name: Triple Kick [LA]
moves.effect_text: After attacking with Triple Kick, hit or miss, the user may Disengage 2m and attack a different target with Triple Kick. This effect may be repeated a second time, targeting a creature that has not been targeted by either prior attack. Before making each attack roll, the user can elect to give up triggering all remaining additional shifts and attacks. Triple Kick gains +1 Accuracy and +2 DB for each attack that is given up. Triple Kick always benefits from the Technician Ability.

moves.name: Triple Threat
moves.effect_text: Limitation: Large Melee Weapons and Long-Range Weapons Only

moves.name: Trop Kick
moves.effect_text: The target receives a -5 penalty to damage rolls for 1 round.

moves.name: Trump Card
moves.effect_text: Whenever the user uses Trump Card, the user gains a Trump Count after the attack is resolved. Trump Card's DB is increased by +2 for each Trump Count.

moves.name: Twineedle
moves.effect_text: Twineedle Poisons the target on 18+.

moves.name: Twister
moves.effect_text: Twister Flinches the target on 18+. Small or Medium targets in the central square of the blast are not hit. Any Pokémon Airborne as a result of Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop above the Blast are hit, ignoring range, and Twister has a Damage Base of 8 against those targets instead.

moves.name: U-Turn
moves.effect_text: The user deals damage and then is immediately recalled to its Poké Ball in the same turn. A New Pokémon may immediately be sent out. Using U-Turn lets a Trapped user be recalled.

moves.name: Uproar
moves.effect_text: All Pokémon and Trainers within 5 meters of the user are cured of Sleep.

moves.name: V-Create
moves.effect_text: Lowers the user's Defense, Special Defense, and Speed by -1 CS each.

moves.name: Venom Drench
moves.effect_text: All Poisoned targets have their Attack, Special Attack, and Speed lowered by -1 CS. Venom Drench cannot miss.

moves.name: Venoshock
moves.effect_text: If the target is Poisoned, Venoshock has a Damage Base of 13 (4d10+10 / 35) instead.

moves.name: Victory Dance
moves.effect_text: If the user performs a Fighting Move on their next turn that deals damage, add its Damage Dice Roll an extra time to the damage. Raise the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Vine Whip
moves.effect_text: *Grants: Threaded

moves.name: Vital Throw
moves.effect_text: If the user is targeted by a Melee attack and has not yet taken a turn this round, the user may declare Vital Throw. After the triggering attack is resolved, the user may use Vital Throw against the triggering foe as a Reaction. Vital Throw cannot miss.

moves.name: Volt Switch
moves.effect_text: If Volt Switch successfully hits its target, the user deals damage and then immediately is returned to its Poke Ball in the same turn. A New Pokemon may immediately be sent out. Using Volt Switch lets a Trapped user be recalled

moves.name: Volt Tackle
moves.effect_text: Volt Tackle Paralyzes the target on 19+.

moves.name: Wake-Up Slap
moves.effect_text: If the target is Asleep, Wake-Up Slap has a Damage Base of 10 (3d8+10 / 24) instead, and cures the target of Sleep.

moves.name: Water Gun
moves.effect_text: *Grants Fountain

moves.name: Water Pledge
moves.effect_text: If an ally uses Fire Pledge or Grass Pledge, you may use Water Pledge as Priority (Advanced) immediately after their turn to target the same foe. If used in conjunction with Fire Pledge, a Rainbow is created that lasts for 5 rounds. If used in conjunction with Grass Pledge, the target and all foes adjacent to the target are slowed and have their Speed reduced by 2 Combat Stages. Consult the Pledge keyword for additional details.

moves.name: Water Pulse
moves.effect_text: Water Pulse Confuses the target on 17+.

moves.name: Water Sport
moves.effect_text: All targets in the burst, including the user, gain a Coat which grants them 1 Step of Resistance to Fire Type Moves. After a target has been hit by a damaging Fire Type Move, the coat is removed. *Grants Fountain

moves.name: Water Spout
moves.effect_text: For each 10% of HP the user is missing, Water Spout's Damage Base is reduced by -1. Water Spout creates a 1 meter burst, but also affects an area 10 meters tall straight up.

moves.name: Waterfall
moves.effect_text: Waterfall Flinches the target on 17+.

moves.name: Wear Down
moves.effect_text: Wear Down lowers the target’s Defense by 1 Combat Stage on Even-Numbered Rolls.

moves.name: Weather Ball
moves.effect_text: If it is Sunny, Weather Ball is Fire-Type. If it is Rainy, Weather Ball is Water-Type. If it is Hailing, Weather Ball is Ice-Type. If it is Sandstorming, Weather Ball is Rock-Type. When a weather effect is on the field, Weather Ball has a Damage Base of 10 (3d8+10 / 24). If there are multiple Weather Effects on the field, choose one type for Weather Ball to be that corresponds with an existing Weather Effect.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.effect_text: The target is put in a Vortex.

moves.name: Whirlwind
moves.effect_text: All targets are pushed X meters, where X is 8 minus their weight class. If the Line targets into a Smokescreen, the smoke is dispersed. All hazards in the Whirlwind are destroyed.

moves.name: Wicked Blow
moves.effect_text: If Wicked Blow hits, it is a Critical Hit. The target is Pushed 6 meters minus their Weight Class. On a roll of 15+, the target is also Tripped.

moves.name: Wide Guard
moves.effect_text: If an Ally adjacent to Wide Guard’s user is hit by a Move, you may use Wide Guard as an Interrupt. All targets adjacent to Wide Guard’s user, including the user, are instead not hit by the triggering Move and do not suffer any of its effects.

moves.name: Wildbolt Storm
moves.effect_text: The Target is Paralyzed on a 15+

moves.name: Will-O-Wisp
moves.effect_text: The target is Burned.

moves.name: Wing Attack
moves.effect_text: None.

moves.name: Wish
moves.effect_text: At the end of the user's next turn, the target regains HP equal to half of its full HP. If the user targets itself and is replaced in battle, the replacement is healed by half of its own HP.

moves.name: Withdraw
moves.effect_text: The user becomes Withdrawn. While Withdrawn, the user becomes immune to Critical Hits and gain 15 Damage Reduction. However, while Withdrawn, the user cannot Shift, and may only use self-targeting Moves. The user may stop being Withdrawn as a Shift Action. September Playtest: The user’s Defense is raised 1 Combat Stage.

moves.name: Wonder Room
moves.effect_text: For 5 rounds, the area is considered Wondered. While Wondered, each individual Pokémon's Defense and Special Defense are switched.

moves.name: Work Up
moves.effect_text: Raise the user’s Attack and Special Attack by +1 CS each.

moves.name: Worry Seed
moves.effect_text: You choose one of the target’s Abilities. Worry Seed changes that Ability to Insomnia for the remainder of the encounter.

moves.name: Wounding Strike
moves.effect_text: The target loses a Tick of Hit Points.

moves.name: Wrap
moves.effect_text: The user gains a +1 Bonus to Accuracy Rolls made to initiate Grapple Maneuvers, and +2 to Skill Checks made to initiate Grapple Maneuvers or gain Dominance. Whenever the user gains Dominance in a Grapple, the target of the Grapple loses a Tick of Hit Points.

moves.name: Wring Out
moves.effect_text: For every 10% the target is below their full HP, Wring Out's Damage Base is reduced by -1.

moves.name: Yawn
moves.effect_text: The target falls Asleep at the end of its next turn. Yawn cannot miss.

moves.name: Zap Cannon
moves.effect_text: Zap Cannon Paralyzes the target. Zap Cannon ignores the target's Evasion if their are no other combatants or Rough or Blocking Terrain within 2 meters of the target.

moves.name: Zen Headbutt
moves.effect_text: Zen Headbutt Flinches the target on 15+.

moves.name: Zing Zap
moves.effect_text: Zing Zap Flinches the target on 15+.

abilities.name: Abominable
abilities.effect_text: The user ignores the Recoil Keyword when attacking, and does not gain injuries from Massive Damage. The user ignores the Recoil Keyword when attacking, and does not gain injuries from Massive Damage.

abilities.name: Abominable [Errata]
abilities.effect_text: The user’s Base HP is increased by +5. Additionally, the user ignores the Recoil Keyword when attacking. Keywords - 2-16 Errata The user’s Base HP is increased by +5. Additionally, the user ignores the Recoil Keyword when attacking.

abilities.name: Absorb Force
abilities.effect_text: The user takes damage as if the attack was one step less effective. Trigger - The user is damaged by a Physical Attack The user takes damage as if the attack was one step less effective.
